(more excitement) Many times it's best to find an area with existing wiring like an outlet or cable TV jack. Then you can just run the line through the cabling holes that the contractor has already cut. In this case, we would want to place our wall box close to that

,


Note:

You can take the easy way out if you have crown moulding on the ceiling. Just pop off the moulding with a small moulding prybar. Be sure to have help with this step and take care. Especially with older moulding. All mouldings can break easily if you're too hasty, but older moulding is especially easy to crack or break. Then just run the cable behind the moulding and then into the walls, which is described below.


Explanation of wall boxes:

There are a couple of types that we're going to look at. First is called a "New Work" box. New Work doesn't mean the new work you're doing. It means new construction where there is no drywall yet. These are typically hammered into place where there is no drywall or other obstructions in the way.
The second is called an "Old Work" box. This means that the home is finished and you don't have the luxury of an open area. Usually these boxes have little fins that flip out behind the drywall and pulls the box tight into place when screwed down. We're using an Old Work box, today.



,,


Studs are typically 16in apart to the center of each stud. Sometimes they are farther apart depending on building codes, non-load bearing walls, and to keep costs down.

, Lay down a drop cloth.

,!

, This is to keep us safe in case we happen to touch or cut wiring in the wall. Also, it's just good practice anytime you're poking around inside of a wall.

, Remember, the outer lip of the wall box is needed to “clamp” the box against the drywall with the fins behind it. So don't cut the hole too big. Smaller is better; we can trim it later.

,


This is where it gets ugly. Since our cable is running across the joists, the only option is to cut out the drywall on the ceiling. Remember, this is an enclosed ceiling between floors. However, in your home you might find an easier way to run the cable. This is a worst case scenario.

, Preferably close to a wall (maybe 8-10 in away) to hide any imperfections when we replace the drywall later.

, Look inside to make sure there aren't any obstructions. Once we determine that it's all clear we make the long cuts across the ceiling. Make sure these lengths of drywall are manageable for easy installation later. Also when you cut the lengths to size, try to cut in the middle of a joist so we have something to attach the drywall to later.


Now we have a nice opening to work in. Take your spade bit and drill a straight series of holes through the joists, for the cable. Keep the holes high enough on the boards so if we decide to screw the drywall into place we don't damage our cable.

, When we need to run with the joists, we can just cut one hole at the start, then one at the end and use our fish tape to run through the ceiling. Since we already figured out what path we were going to take, you already know where to stop the cutting.

,, Make sure to look inside for obstructions.


Your friend (we'll call him Bob) stays on the first floor to help us find the perfect spot to drill down. Use your hammer or whatever to tap on the floor in the hole until you both zero in on the right spot.

, We'll have Bob do it so we can watch and make sure that the hole comes through in the right spot. This will be a thicker set of boards since it's load bearing.


If everything went to plan, we should have everything ready to run the cable. If it didn't, adjust to make it right.

, Drop the cable through the holes and draw it through gently. Anytime that you need to make a turn, draw out as much cable as you need before turning, to reduce stress on the cable.

, Anytime that you need it, unroll it, push it through the opening until it arrives at its destination, attach the cable to it using the electrical tape. Then gently pull the tape back through. That's all there is to it.

,,, Tape and spackle it. Sand and paint it. Then replace any mouldings that you have.

How to Sleep when Stressed

Waking up in the middle of the night is normal, but it can be frustrating when you can't fall back asleep. If stress is keeping you awake, you may benefit from learning some relaxation techniques and stress-reduction strategies. You may also be able to change your sleep habits so that you're better able to handle stress when it comes up at night.

Identify your stressors. Knowing what's causing your stress can help you take steps to minimize it. You may be stressed about something you have control over, such as a project at work, or something that's out of your control, such as a family member's health condition. Keep a stress journal for a few weeks to identify trends and patterns in your stress triggers.

Relax your body. When your body is relaxed, your mind is more likely to follow. Lie down in a quiet, dark room, and try to empty your mind of your racing thoughts. Take slow, deep breaths, and focus on relaxing each part of your body one by one.

 Breathe deeply. Deep breathing exercises help send messages to your brain to relax and divert your attention away from your stress. Inhale slowly through your nose, then exhale through your mouth. As you breathe, focus on the movement of your breath and the rise and fall of your stomach.

Try to clear your mind. It's easy for your mind to race when you're stressed out. Don't let your thoughts run wild. Instead of thinking about all the things you have to do, make a to-do list for the next day, and try to set it aside.

Do a body scan. Start by tensing and relaxing the muscles in your toes and progressively working your way up to your neck and face. Tense your muscles for about five seconds and release the tension for 30 seconds, and repeat as necessary.

Take a soothing bath. Draw a warm bath, and add bath salts or a few drops of essential oil, such as lavender, if you have them on hand. Soak for about 20 minutes to help you relax.

Have a light snack. If your stomach is growling, you might have a hard time falling back asleep. Eat a light, sleep-inducing snack, such as a bowl of oatmeal, to help you feel more relaxed and ready for bed.

Drink a glass of warm milk. A glass of warm milk is a classic choice for a reason. Warm milk has a soothing effect, and the combination of milk and honey is known to promote relaxation.

Take a sleep aid. If you've tried the above methods and nothing seems to work, you may want to consider taking a sleep aid. The right sleep aid for you will be safe and effective, and will help you fall asleep quickly and comfortably.

Limit all screen time. Using your phone, tablet, TV, or computer can keep your brain wired, making it hard to truly wind down. Try to limit your screen time for at least an hour before bed.

Wind down before bed. Give yourself time to decompress and relax after a long day. Listen to a podcast, read a book, or take a warm bath before bed. Do something that helps you feel calm and sleepy.

Set aside your worries. Try to put your worries aside so you can fall back asleep. If something is bothering you, make a to-do list for the next day, and try to set it aside until morning.

How to Help a Loved One Recover from a Stroke

After a stroke, your loved one will need help with various daily activities, such as bathing, eating, and getting dressed.

If you're caring for someone after a stroke, these tips can help you provide the best possible support:

1. Understand the effects of stroke.
2. Recognize the warning signs of another stroke.
3. Encourage physical activity.
4. Help with daily living activities.
5. Support them emotionally.
6. Take care of yourself.

1. Understand the effects of stroke.

A stroke occurs when a blood vessel in the brain becomes blocked or bursts, depriving the brain of blood and oxygen. This can cause severe damage to the brain tissue, which can result in a range of physical and cognitive effects.

Some of the most common effects of stroke include:

- Paralysis or weakness on one side of the body
- Slurred speech or difficulty understanding others
- Difficulty seeing in one or both eyes
- Feeling confused or unable to understand simple commands
- Having trouble walking or maintaining balance
- Lack of feeling or numbness in one part of the body
- Dizziness or loss of balance or coordination

It's important to understand the effects of stroke so that you can provide the best possible care for your loved one.

2. Recognize the warning signs of another stroke.

Strokes can often be prevented by recognizing the warning signs and seeking medical attention. Be aware of the following symptoms that may indicate a stroke:

- Sudden numbness or weakness, especially on one side of the body
- Sudden confusion or trouble understanding others
- Sudden trouble seeing in one or both eyes
- Sudden trouble walking or maintaining balance
- Sudden severe headache with no known cause
- Sudden vomiting or nausea
- Sudden loss of consciousness

If you notice any of these symptoms in your loved one, call for medical help immediately.

3. Encourage physical activity.

Regular physical activity can help improve stroke recovery. It can also reduce the risk of having another stroke. Encourage your loved one to do some form of physical activity every day, even if it's just a walk around the block.

4. Help with daily living activities.

After a stroke, your loved one may need help with various daily living activities, such as bathing, eating, and getting dressed. Offer to help with these tasks, and be patient and gentle as your loved one learns to regain their independence.

5. Support them emotionally.

A stroke can be a frightening and overwhelming experience. Your loved one may feel anxious, scared, or depressed. Offer emotional support by listening to them, reassuring them, and encouraging them.

6. Take care of yourself.

Caring for a loved one after a stroke can be stressful and overwhelming. Don't forget to take care of yourself as well. Make sure to get enough rest and exercise, and consider joining a support group or seeking counseling to help you cope with the stress of caregiving.

How to Feed Chickens

So you've got a couple of chickens and you're not sure what to feed them. You've come to the right place. This article will tell you everything you need to know about feeding chickens.

Choosing Chicken Feed

Chickens are not picky. They will eat most things, but you should try to stick to foods that are healthy for them. Chicken feed comes in two basic varieties: layer feed and broiler feed.

Broiler feed is for chickens that are being raised for meat. It will make them grow faster and bigger. Layer feed is for chickens that are being raised for eggs. It will help them lay more eggs and produce larger eggs.

You can find chicken feed at most feed stores or online.

Mixing Chicken Feed

If you have a large number of chickens, you may want to mix your own chicken feed. This will save you money and give you more control over what your chickens are eating.

To mix your own chicken feed, you will need a large container like a bucket or trough. You will also need a mix of chicken feed ingredients.

Ingredients for chicken feed include:

 cracked corn

grains

legume

vitamins and minerals

water

You can find all of these ingredients at a feed store or online.

Mixing chicken feed is a simple process. First, combine all of the ingredients in your container. Then, add enough water to make a wet mixture. You want it to be damp, but not too wet.

Once you have the right consistency, mix everything together until it is well combined.

Feeding Chicken Pellets

If you are feeding your chickens store-bought chicken feed, you will need to feed them chicken pellets. These are small, round pieces of chicken feed that can be bought at most feed stores or online.

To feed chicken pellets to your chickens, simply pour them into a trough or other container. Make sure that the pellets are fresh and that they are not expired.

Your chickens will then eat the chicken pellets as needed.

 Feeding Chickens Table Scraps

If you are looking for a way to save money on chicken feed, you can feed your chickens table scraps. Table scraps are simply leftover food from your meals.

Before you feed table scraps to your chickens, there are a few things you should keep in mind. First, chickens are not picky, but they do have preferences.

You should also avoid feeding your chickens certain foods. These include:

Avocados

carbonated drinks

chocolate

 caffeinated drinks

Also, it's important to note that some table scraps can be harmful to chickens. These include:

bones

raw eggs

liver

Onion family (onions, garlic, etc.)

sodium

spicy foods

Finally, it's always a good idea to wash your table scraps before feeding them to your chickens. This will help to prevent the spread of bacteria and other diseases.

As you approach puberty, it's natural to have questions about your menstrual cycle, such as when you might expect to get your period and what it will be like. You can learn what to expect and how to prepare by asking your doctor or another trusted adult. 

If you are worried about any of the symptoms you are experiencing, or you have questions about your period that are not answered here, talk to your doctor or another trusted adult.

Preparation

A great way to prepare for your period is to start a period calendar. This will help you keep track of when your period is due and when it actually starts. This will be helpful for when you are trying to prevent pregnancy and when you are trying to achieve pregnancy. When you are trying to prevent pregnancy and your period is late, you will know right away instead of waiting until it is two weeks late. 

There is also an app called "HelloFlo" that can help you keep track of your period. It will send you notifications when your period is expected and when it is late.

To start a period calendar, you will need to know when your last period started. This is the date you started your last period and not the date you stopped. You should also write down the date of your next expected period. This is usually 14 days after the start of your last period. Each month, write down the date of your actual period. This will help you know if it is late or early.

Being pretty and popular in middle school was easy. You just had to be yourself, and you were well on your way to being the most popular girl in school. But now that you are in high school, things have changed. You are no longer the most popular girl in school, and you may even be the least popular. This guide will help you become the pretty and popular girl that you want to be.

Get the Look

If you want to be pretty and popular, you need to look the part. This means having the latest fashion trends and wearing them well. You should also be sure to have the perfect makeup and hair.

If you are not sure what the latest fashion trends are, there are a few things you can do. First, you can check out fashion magazines or websites. Second, you can ask your friends what they are wearing. Once you know what the latest fashion trends are, you can start to wear them.

If you want to be popular, you should also be sure to have the perfect makeup and hair. This means having makeup that is not too heavy or too light. Your makeup should also match your skin tone and your outfit. You should also be sure to have hair that is well-groomed and stylish.

If you are not sure how to do your makeup or hair, there are a few things you can do. First, you can ask your friends for help. Second, you can check out beauty websites or books. Once you know how to do your makeup and hair, you can start to wear it.

Be Social

If you want to be pretty and popular, you need to be social. This means talking to your classmates and making friends with them. You should also be sure to join any clubs or organizations that you can.

Be Yourself

Fostering is a beautiful and rewarding way to help children in need. However, it is important to remember that fostering is not the same as adopting. When you adopt a child, you become that child's legal parent, with all the rights and responsibilities that come with being a parent. When you foster a child, you are essentially providing a temporary home for them while their biological parents are unable to care for them.

Fostering can be a challenging and emotional experience, as you will be dealing with children who have experienced trauma and may have difficulty adjusting to a new home. However, with patience, understanding, and support, you can help these children heal and thrive.

If you're interested in fostering, the first step is to contact your local foster care agency or department of social services. They will be able to provide you with information about the foster parenting process and help you determine if it is right for you.

Once you have decided to foster, you will need to complete a comprehensive training program. This will teach you about the challenges you may face as a foster parent and how to deal with them. You will also learn about the legalities of fostering and your rights and responsibilities.

After you have completed your training, you will be matched with a child or children who are in need of a foster home. It's important to be open and flexible about the age and gender of the children you are willing to foster, as well as the length of time you are able to care for them.

Fostering can be a rewarding and fulfilling experience, but it's not always easy. It's important to be patient, understanding, and supportive of the children in your care. Remember, you are providing them with a temporary home and a safe and stable environment, and you are making a difference in their lives.

Taking care of a puppy is a lot of fun, but it's also a lot of work. Puppies are like children: They need constant attention, they get into everything, and they need to be taken outside often. But if you're prepared for the work, you'll find that taking care of a puppy is a lot of fun.

Once you have everything you need, it's time to start taking care of your puppy. The first thing you should do is take him to the vet for a checkup. This will help you make sure he's healthy and that he's been vaccinated.

After the vet, it's time to start taking care of your puppy at home. This means feeding him, walking him, and playing with him. You should also make sure to give him plenty of attention and affection.

If you're having trouble taking care of your puppy, there are plenty of resources available to help you. You can find books and websites that will give you more information about how to take care of your puppy, and you can also talk to your vet or other pet owners for advice.

, The scruff refers to the loose skin found around the kitten's neck, behind the head. The mother cat uses this area to carry the kittens around. Picking up the kitten from here usually won't hurt the kitten because it doesn't weigh much, provided you do so very gently and only use the loose skin with a gentle but firm hold.For more details, read How to hold a cat (or kitten) by the scruff.

, If you have a cat that is like this, then you'll just need to deal with it as best you can, and only handle the cat for such occasions as needing to move it, taking it to the vet and giving it medication. You can still groom and pet the cat.

, This is much less threatening to an animal than coming at it front on. Anitra Frazier also recommends turning the cat to face away from you before picking it up (in other words, approach the cat from behind).Begin by putting your hand forward for the cat to sniff. This is a sign of respect for the cat and lets it know that you are familiar and calm. Do not make any sudden jerky movements; instead, just rub your fingers and thumb together.
Give the cat a scratch between the ears and on its chin or down the sides of the cheekbones.
Place your first hand behind the cat's front legs, near the armpits.
Lift the cat up, quickly scooping the hind legs up with your other hand, coming in from below. It helps to lift the cat's head up higher than the back part; this will tilt the cat's weight onto your rear-end supporting hand.
Bring the cat gently but swiftly close to your body to provide additional support. This reassures the cat that it has plenty of support and will ease a desire to struggle against being held.
As much as you can, leave the cat's legs free from the hold. This allows the cat to feel free and gives it a sense of being safe and able to get moving if it needs to; it is also reassuring that its free legs will land first as you put the cat back down.
To put the cat back down, tilt the head downward so that the cat can see where it is headed for landing.

, There is debate about the acceptability of this hold for adult cats because if it is done incorrectly, it can hurt the cat. As such, some experts recommend that it not be used at all on adult cats.If using this method, always quickly support the hind end with your other hand, to provide additional support and ease the weight pull.If in doubt, you are best not using this hold at all, and it should never be used on a large, heavy cat as the weight may just make it too difficult to do safely.


If the cat relaxes when you use this hold, this can be an indication that you are doing it correctly and that the cat is tolerating it.
For more details, read How to hold a cat by the scruff.

,
Be sure to support the cat's hind legs with your hands.
Cuddle with care.

, There are some things that you should never do by way of handling the cat, as they can cause injury to the cat, and possibly to you if the cat retaliates. These include:


Do not ever pull a cat by its tail. If the cat is stuck under furniture or some other place, the tail is not a retrieval device.
Ditto for legs. Do not ever pull a cat towards you using a leg or legs. The cat's limbs are fragile and human strength can easily dislocate the leg.Do not squeeze or hold the cat's paws or forelegs.Cats find this threatening.
Do not squeeze the whole cat. The cat's structure is not designed to be squeezed and the cat can be hurt if you do this.
Avoid breathing in the cat's ears, eyes or nose.To the cat, this is a form of unbearable tickling and the cat may take it as a sign of aggression.

, If you think that it might bite, scratch and struggle, place a towel or blanket over the cat before picking it up. The fact that the cat cannot see can help to calm the cat down.Always have its carrier case close so that you can place the cat straight into it for safety and carriage to the vet.

, Gauge how receptive the cat is to being pick up by the behavioral clues it is giving out. If it appears irritable, unfriendly and not interested in your proffered hand for sniffing, it's probably best to leave the cat well alone until it has calmed down and is more receptive. If you really need to handle the cat for safety reasons, try the towel or blanket approach as suggested in the previous step.

, Cats can sense and read your body language and vibes.If you feel scared, worried or incompetent about handling the cat, the cat will pick this up and will possibly react to your lack of confidence by refusing to cooperate. Be gentle but firm, and have trust in your own ability to handle the cat correctly.

, The cat should recognize that skin and flesh is not a toy for biting. Injury to yourself can occur you if you teach the cat to play with your hands and it then bites them whenever it sees your hands flying about. Do not ever encourage this habit.

, The playfulness is a sign to encourage you to interact through wriggling, tossing, pulling about toys on strings, sticks, etc. It is recommended that you let the cat's playfulness dissipate before trying to pick up or cuddle the cat.

, Also be aware that closer to the time of birth, she may be less likely to be in the mood for cuddling but you can still show affection by spending time with her on her terms, sitting yourself near wherever she chooses to sit.


Some cats won't like being picked up during pregnancy, due to increased sensitivity. Gauge it from your cat's reaction and follow her preference.

, Just be extra careful not to squeeze her belly region or to place any pressure on it. Don't lift her too high; try bending down to her level, then keeping her at a lower level, such as taking her to the couch and sitting together.


Her weight should rest on your arm when held close to your body, so that you're not holding the stomach.

, Ensure that she has a quiet, stress-free location away from all disturbances. No matter where she chooses to give birth, wait until the kittens are all born before moving her and them to your preferred kitten-raising location. If you try to move her too early, she may stop labor and this can be life-threatening.

How to Make a Snake Puppet
A snake puppet is a fun and easy way to entertain children. The puppet can be used to tell a story or to simply play with the kids. This guide will show you how to make a simple snake puppet out of paper plates and colored construction paper.

What You'll Need
1 paper plate
1/2 yard of colored construction paper
Scissors
Hot glue gun and glue sticks
Scotch Adhesive Putty
1/2 yard of white cotton fabric
 propagate scissors
Thread
Needle
Pinking shears (optional)
How to Make a Snake Puppet
Cut a hole in the center of the paper plate and set it aside.

Cut a piece of construction paper to fit the back of the plate. glue it in place.

Cut a strip of construction paper and glue it to the top of the plate, forming a curve.

Cut a piece of putty and stick it to the back of the plate.

Cut a piece of fabric and fold it in half. Sew along the long edge, leaving the short edge open. Turn the tube right side out and stuff it with filling.

Insert the tube into the putty ring on the back of the plate and glue it in place.

Cut a piece of construction paper and glue it over the back of the tube, covering the putty ring.

Draw a snake's head on a piece of construction paper and cut it out. glue it to the front of the plate.

Draw eyes and a mouth on the snake's head and cut them out.

Circle3 is a very old method for finding the ratio of a circle's circumference to its diameter. The method dates back to the Greek mathematician Archimedes, who discovered it in the 3rd century B.C. It's a simple method, but it requires some patience. With this method, you can find out what pi is, based on the ratios you get from drawing different circles.

Described as one of the most irrational numbers in mathematics, pi is a unique number that has been studied by mathematicians for centuries. But why is it so special? What makes it so unique? And what are some ways you can learn more about this mysterious number?

Step 1: Draw a Circle
The first step is to draw a circle. You can do this by drawing a small circle within a larger square. This will help ensure that the circle is perfectly round.

Step 2: Measure the Diameter
Now you need to measure the diameter of the circle. The diameter is the distance from one side of the circle to the other.

Step 3: Measure the Circumference
Next, you need to measure the circumference of the circle. The circumference is the distance around the outside of the circle.

Step 4: Divide the Circumference by the Diameter
Now that you have both the circumference and diameter of the circle, you can divide the circumference by the diameter. This will give you the ratio of the circumference to the diameter.

Step 5: Find the Value of Pi
To find the value of pi, you need to repeat this process with different circles. Each time you get a different ratio, you can compare it to the ratio you got from the previous circle. Eventually, you will be able to see a pattern emerge. This pattern will lead you to the value of pi.

You'll only get confused if you try to compare the two.;
, There are treble recorders for any budget, both plastic and wooden. A wooden one will have much nicer tone, but it will cost a lot more money. If you're starting out, it's probably best to buy a plastic one, in case you decide at a later date that you don't like it. An additional concern when buying is that a plastic one will remain to be useful when you upgrade (it's very good for practicing on), whereas a cheaper wooden one will not. It's always best to buy the best you can afford, but a good plastic will be a better option than a cheap wooden one.

, Unlike the descant (soprano) recorder, the treble will invariably come disassembled in a case. It comes in three parts: the the head joint (into which you blow), the body (which contains most of the fingering holes), and the foot joint. Ensure that the foot joint is skewed slightly to the right, so that when your fingers cover all of the holes, your little finger rests easily over the final hole.

, Your left thumb should cover the hole on the underside of the body and your middle three fingers should cover the holes on top. Your little finger should be free. The thumb of your right hand should balance the recorder and the remaining fingers should cover the remaining holes.

, This is the note E. Try getting someone to play that note on the piano. If you're higher than the piano, you're blowing too hard and if you're lower then you're blowing too softly. Experiment until you find the right amount to blow.

, Before playing any note, pronounce a "doo" sound, so that your tongue touches the roof of your mouth. This produces a much clearer note.

, Once again, check if you're blowing the right amount by testing the note on a piano.

, Check if you're blowing the right amount by testing the note on a piano again, but you should be starting to get a feel for the amount you need to blow to play a note in tune.

, Play a C, then put the forefinger and middle finger of your right hand on their holes. You should have 5 holes (and the underneath hole) covered.

, This note requires less air pressure than previous notes, so make sure that you don't blow too hard.

, This note requires still less air pressure than G, so make sure that you don't blow too hard. This is the lowest note on the treble recorder.

, Moving from E to F (as is common) takes some getting used to, and is quite difficult to get smooth. Practice it. You will learn an alternative fingering for E later to accommodate this, but if possible, always try to use the E fingering above. High F is also known as F' .

, You may have wondered why B was missed out earlier. This is because Bb makes up the F major scale, and is therefore taught before B (since the treble recorder is an "F" recorder). Further, it is more difficult because it is a "forked note", meaning the middle finger is off the hole, but the forefinger and ring finger are on the holes. So, play a low F and remove the middle finger of your right hand.

, Simply play F, G, A, Bb, C, D, E, F' and then back down.

, This will take some practice to make sure that the recorder is properly balanced and that you get a nice even tone. Try playing it against the piano, to check tuning. High G is also known as G' .

, Play a High G and then add your forefinger, remembering to keep your thumb off its hole. A very common trill is F# to G, and on recorder, this is exceptionally easy. Just quickly take your forefinger off the hole and put it back, without tonguing each time. High F# is also known as F#' .

, Play a note G and remove the forefinger of your right hand. You can trill between C and B really easily by just pulling your middle and ring fingers up and down quickly without tonguing.

, Simply play G, A, B, C, D, E, F#', G' and then back down.

, Play a note E and add the middle finger of your left hand and the forefinger of your right hand.

, Play G, A, Bb, C, D, E, F#', G' going up and G', F', Eb, D, C, Bb, A, G going down.

, To get high notes, one must employ a technique called "pinching", which involves your thumb. Simply slip the tip of your thumb inside the thumb hole. Practice moving your thumb in this way, between pinched and non-pinched, because you will have to do this a lot.

, Play an A, but instead of covering the hole with your thumb, pinch it, as explained above. It should sound an octave higher than the lower A. Practice moving between A and High A (A'), remembering to tongue every time. Check your tuning on the piano.

, Play a G but remove your thumb and the forefinger of your left hand. This note is quite difficult, but necessary for the next two scales.

, Play A, B, C, D, E, F#', G#', A' going up, then A', G', F', E, D, C, B, A going down.

, Play an A and remove the ring finger of your left hand. Then, notice that there are two holes under the ring finger of your right hand. Cover the rightmost one of these. This will take some practice. Try moving from C# to D. Check your tuning on a piano.

, Play A, B, C#, D, E, F#', G#', A' and then back down again.

, Play a High A, remove the middle finger of your right hand and add your right hand's ring finger. Remember not to add your right hand's little finger as you did with regular Bb.

, Play Bb, C, D, Eb, F', G', A', Bb' and then back down again.

How to Play EuroMillions2

EuroMillions2 is a transnational lottery that requires players to match two sets of numbers. The game is played by selecting five numbers from a set of 50 numbers and two additional numbers, called Euro Numbers, from a set of nine numbers.

The top prize in EuroMillions2 is won by matching all seven numbers. There are also prizes for matching just the five main numbers, four main numbers plus one Euro Number, or three main numbers plus two Euro Numbers.

EuroMillions2 is played in the same way as EuroMillions. The only difference is that a new set of numbers is drawn for EuroMillions2 every day. The top prize for EuroMillions2 is also lower than the top prize for EuroMillions.

To play EuroMillions2, you must first select five numbers from a set of 50 numbers. Then, you must select two Euro Numbers from a set of nine numbers. The five numbers and two Euro Numbers must be matched with the numbers drawn to win the top prize.

The odds of winning the top prize in EuroMillions2 are 1 in 118,462,058. The odds of winning any prize are 1 in 13.

How to Send and Receive Data from Your Cell Phone to Your Computer1

Cell phones are designed to send and receive data from a cell tower. By using a cell tower, your cell phone can send and receive data from anywhere in the world. The data your cell phone sends and receives is handled by your cell phone service provider.
What is Bluetooth?

Bluetooth is a wireless technology for exchanging data between devices such as your cell phone and your computer. Bluetooth devices connect to each other by using radio waves. The data is sent and received using the same frequency. 

How to Send Data from Your Cell Phone to Your Computer

1. Find out if your cell phone has Bluetooth. You can do this by reading the owner's manual that came with your cell phone or by looking for the Bluetooth logo on the box your cell phone came in. You can also look for Bluetooth in the settings of your cell phone.
2. If your cell phone has Bluetooth, turn it on. You can do this by accessing the settings in your cell phone.
3. Find out if your computer has Bluetooth. You can do this by reading the owner's manual that came with your computer or by looking for the Bluetooth logo on the box your computer came in. You can also look for Bluetooth in the settings of your computer.
4. If your computer has Bluetooth, turn it on. You can do this by accessing the settings in your computer.
5. Put your cell phone and your computer close together. The two devices need to be close enough to send and receive data. The distance between the two devices depends on the strength of the Bluetooth signal.
6. Connect your cell phone and your computer. You can do this by using the Bluetooth software on your cell phone and computer. The exact steps you need to take depend on the software you are using.7. Wait for the two devices to connect. Once they are connected, you will be able to send and receive data between your cell phone and your computer.

How to Receive Data from Your Cell Phone to Your Computer

1. Find out if your cell phone has Bluetooth. You can do this by reading the owner's manual that came with your cell phone or by looking for the Bluetooth logo on the box your cell phone came in. You can also look for Bluetooth in the settings of your cell phone.
2. If your cell phone has Bluetooth, turn it on. You can do this by accessing the settings in your cell phone.
3. Find out if your computer has Bluetooth. You can do this by reading the owner's manual that came with your computer or by looking for the Bluetooth logo on the box your computer came in. You can also look for Bluetooth in the settings of your computer.
4. If your computer has Bluetooth, turn it on. You can do this by accessing the settings in your computer.
5. Put your cell phone and your computer close together. The two devices need to be close enough to send and receive data. The distance between the two devices depends on the strength of the Bluetooth signal.
6. Connect your cell phone and your computer. You can do this by using the Bluetooth software on your cell phone and computer. The exact steps you need to take depend on the software you are using.
7. Wait for the two devices to connect. Once they are connected, you will be able to send and receive data between your cell phone and your computer.
8. Receive data from your cell phone to your computer. The data will be sent from your cell phone to your computer via Bluetooth.

While the Wii can play games off of an SD card or USB drive, it can also play games off of a disc. This is a slightly more complicated process, as the Wii's discs are in a proprietary format. You will need to download a third-party application to burn your games. The rest of the process is simple enough, so you should be burning your own discs in no time.

Download the homebrew application "Wii Backup Manager." This program will allow you to copy Wii games from your PC to a disc. "Wii Backup Manager" is a free program that can be found at several different websites, including the official Wii Homebrew website.

Download Wii game ISOs. In order to burn Wii games, you will need to download Wii ISOs. These are images of Wii games. You can download these from several sites, including The Homebrew Network and Wii ISOs.

Put the Wii game ISOs onto your USB drive. In order to do this, you will need to drag and drop the ISOs onto your USB drive. Simply open your file browser, and move the ISO files from their current location to your USB drive.

Launch "Wii Backup Manager." This program will allow you to burn Wii games onto a disc. To start, simply click on the "Wii" icon in the upper-left corner of the screen. This will take you to the main Wii menu. From here, click on the "Wii Backups" option.

Click on "Create Wii ISO." This will open a new window. From here, you will need to click on the "Browse" button. This will open a new window that will allow you to select the Wii game ISO you want to burn.

Select your Wii game ISO. Go to the location on your computer where you downloaded the ISOs earlier. Select the ISO you want to burn.

Click on "Burn." This will open a new window that will ask you how many copies of the game you want to burn. Enter the number of copies you want, and click on the "Burn" button.

The Cessna 310 is a popular single-engine aircraft with a reputation for stability and safety. It is a popular choice for pilots who want a versatile aircraft that can be used for both personal and business purposes.

This wikihow will teach you how to fly a Cessna 310, including how to start the engine, taxi, take off and land. We will also provide some tips on how to make the most of your flight.

Step 1: Start the Engine

1. Make sure the fuel mixture is set to the richest setting.
2. Place the key in the ignition, which should be located behind the pilot's seat on the left side.
3. Turn the key to start the engine.
4. The engine should start immediately. If it does not, check the fuel mixture and try again.
5. Once the engine is running, you will need to warm it up before taking off.

Step 2: Taxi

1. Make sure the parking brake is on.
2. Put the gearshift in neutral.
3. Open the throttle all the way.
4. Push the plane forward until the wheels start rolling.
5. Close the throttle when the plane reaches the end of the runway.
6. Use the brakes to stop the plane before the end of the runway.

Step 3: Take Off

1. Make sure the parking brake is on.
2. Put the gearshift in neutral.
3. Open the throttle all the way.
4. Push the plane forward until the wheels start rolling.
5. Keep pushing the plane forward until it reaches the end of the runway.
6. Close the throttle when the plane reaches the end of the runway.
7. Pull back on the stick to take off.

Step 4: Land

1. Find a place to land the plane.
2. Make sure the area is clear of any obstacles.
3. Bring the plane in for a landing.
4. Reduce the throttle to idle.
5. Use the brakes to stop the plane.

How to Apply for a Visa to the United States if You're from Mexico

Apply for an F1 Visa

If you are coming to the United States to study, you will need an F1 visa. This visa allows you to enter the United States as a non-immigrant student. You must have been accepted to a US university or other approved institution to be considered for this visa.

Prepare the Application

Once you have been accepted to a US university, you will be provided with the necessary paperwork to apply for your F1 visa. This includes the I-20 form, which is the document that you will need to present when you attend your visa interview.

You will also need to complete the DS-160 form, which is the standard application for a US non-immigrant visa. This form will ask for information about your background, education, and plans for your stay in the US.

 Schedule an Interview

After you have completed the DS-160 form, you will need to schedule an interview at a US Embassy or Consulate in Mexico. You will need to have your passport and I-20 form in order to schedule the interview.

Prepare for the Interview

On the day of your interview, you will need to appear at the embassy or consulate with your passport, I-20 form, and any other necessary documents. You will need to answer questions about your background, education, and plans for your stay in the US.

It is important to be honest and thorough in your answers, as any discrepancies can result in a denial of your visa.

After the interview, you will be notified of the results of your application.

The Microsoft Store is an essential tool for all Windows 10 and 11 computers, allowing you to download apps and games, and sync your activity across all your devices. So when the Store stops working, it can cause some serious issues. Here are some ways to fix the problems.

Make Sure the Store Is Open

If you're having trouble opening the Microsoft Store, make sure that you have an active Internet connection. Then, try restarting the Store:
1) Press the Win+R keys to open the Run dialog box.
2) Type shutdown.exe /p and press Enter.
3) Wait for the Store to close.
4) Click the Store icon.

If you're still having trouble, try resetting the Store:
1) Press the Win+S keys to open the Search menu.
2) Type wsreset.exe and press Enter.
3) Wait for the process to finish.
4) Try opening the Store again.

If you're still having trouble, try reinstalling the Store:
1) Press the Win+S keys to open the Search menu.
2) Type msstore.exe -uninstall and press Enter.
3) Follow the on-screen instructions to complete the uninstallation.
4) Reinstall the Store by opening the Microsoft Store website in your browser and clicking the "Download Store" button.

Try Resetting Your App Preferences

If you're having trouble with apps not downloading from the Microsoft Store, try resetting your app preferences:
1) Press the Win+S keys to open the Search menu.
2) Type settings.exe /category: apps and press Enter.
3) In the Apps and Features tab, click the "Reset" button.
4) Click the "Reset" button again to confirm.
5) Try downloading the app again.

If you're still having trouble, try clearing the cache and temporary files from your computer:
1) Press the Win+R keys to open the Run dialog box.
2) Type cleanmgr.exe and press Enter.
3) Wait for the process to finish.
4) Try downloading the app again.

If you're still having trouble, try reinstalling the app:
1) Press the Win+S keys to open the Search menu.
2) Type msstore.exe -uninstall and press Enter.
3) Follow the on-screen instructions to complete the uninstallation.
4) Reinstall the app by opening the Microsoft Store website in your browser and clicking the "Download Store" button.

Try Resetting Your Microsoft Store Cache

If you're having trouble with the Microsoft Store not downloading apps or games, try resetting the Store cache:
1) Press the Win+S keys to open the Search menu.
2) Type wsreset.exe and press Enter.
3) Wait for the process to finish.
4) Try downloading the app again.

If you're still having trouble, try reinstalling the Store:
1) Press the Win+S keys to open the Search menu.
2) Type msstore.exe -uninstall and press Enter.
3) Follow the on-screen instructions to complete the uninstallation.
4) Reinstall the Store by opening the Microsoft Store website in your browser and clicking the "Download Store" button.

Adding a wall switch to a light fixture that is controlled by a chain can be a great way to provide more convenient access to the light. This is a relatively simple project that can be completed in a few steps.

First, you will need to remove the existing chain and the fixture from the wall. This can be done by unscrewing the screws that hold the fixture in place. Once the fixture is removed, you will need to cut a hole in the wall for the new switch. This can be done by using a drill to make a hole in the wall, then using a jigsaw or other cutting tool to enlarge the hole.

Next, you will need to install the new switch. This can be done by attaching the switch to the wall using screws or other fasteners, then connecting the switch to the existing wiring. This will typically involve attaching the black wire from the switch to the black wire from the existing lighting system, and attaching the white wire from the switch to the white wire from the existing lighting system.

Once the switch is in place, you can reattach the fixture to the wall. This can be done by inserting the existing wiring through the hole in the fixture, then attaching the fixture to the wall using the same screws or other fasteners that were used previously.

How to Improve Your Appearance

Wearing the right clothes and putting on makeup isn't enough to look good. If you want to look your best, you need to take care of your skin, hair, and nails. And, don't forget, a great pair of shoes can improve your appearance, too.

Step 1
Exfoliate. If you want to have soft, smooth skin, you need to exfoliate. Exfoliating removes dead skin, which tends to collect on the surface of your face and body. If you don't exfoliate, your skin will look dull and tired. For best results, exfoliate at least once a week, but twice a week is ideal.

Step 2
Moisturize. If you have dry or flaky skin, you need to moisturize. Moisturizer helps protect your skin from drying out and promotes a soft, smooth look. For best results, apply moisturizer every day, especially after you get out of the shower and after you exfoliate.

Step 3
Apply foundation. Foundation is a great way to even out your skin tone and create a smooth, flawless look. However, it's important to choose a foundation that matches your skin tone. Otherwise, it will look cakey and obvious. It's also important to apply it correctly. Dot foundation on the areas of your face where you need it the most, and then use a damp makeup sponge to blend it out.

Step 4
Wear the right colors. Wearing the right colors can do wonders for your appearance. If you wear colors that match your skin tone, you'll look healthy and vibrant. However, if you wear colors that are too bright or too dark for your skin tone, you'll look washed out.

Step 5
Do your hair. Doing your hair can make a big difference in your appearance. If you have oily or limp hair, try blow-drying it with a round brush for volume. If you have dry or frizzy hair, try applying a leave-in conditioner and then blow-drying it straight.

Step 6
Take care of your nails. Your nails can say a lot about your appearance. If they're chipped and unkempt, you'll look like you don't take care of yourself. However, if they're well-groomed and polished, you'll look put together and polished. For best results, get a manicure every two weeks and apply clear polish in between appointments.

Step 7
Wear the right shoes. A great pair of shoes can improve your appearance, but the wrong pair can ruin it. If you want to look your best, choose classic, well-made shoes in dark colors. Stay away from trendy, cheap shoes in bright colors.

A transient ischemic attack (TIA) can be a warning sign for a future stroke. You should work to lower your risk of having a TIA, because you are at a much higher risk of having a stroke after a TIA. There are many things you can do to prevent another stroke.

1. Take a baby aspirin. 
A baby aspirin is an 81 mg aspirin. Take one every day. Aspirin can help prevent blood clots from forming and reduce your risk for another TIA or stroke.
2. Stop smoking.
Smoking cigarettes can greatly increase your risk for another TIA or stroke. Quitting smoking can reduce your risk. You are more likely to have a TIA or stroke if you smoke cigarettes and take birth control pills.
3. Control your blood pressure.
High blood pressure can lead to a TIA or stroke. Blood pressure is the force blood exerts on the walls of your arteries as your heart pumps. If you have high blood pressure, your arteries will be damaged, and your risk of a TIA or stroke will increase. Blood pressure screening is an essential part of your physical exam. Your blood pressure should be below 140/90 mm Hg (or the target blood pressure goal set by your doctor).4. Control your cholesterol.
4. If you have high cholesterol, you are more likely to have a TIA or stroke. Your cholesterol should be below 200 mg/dL.
5. Get regular exercise.
Exercise can help prevent a TIA or stroke. It can also help you lose weight, which will also help to prevent a TIA or stroke. Try to exercise for 30 minutes on most days of the week. You don't have to do the full 30 minutes all at once. If you can only do 10 minutes at a time, that's fine. Just do some kind of activity for 30 minutes every day.
6. Lose weight.
People who are overweight or obese are more likely to have a TIA or stroke. Even if you are not overweight, you may still have a high waist measurement, which can increase your risk for a TIA or stroke. Waist measurements should be less than 35 inches for women and less than 40 inches for men.
7. Manage your stress.
People under stress are more likely to have a TIA or stroke. Stress can lead to high blood pressure, which can lead to a TIA or stroke. Stress can also cause you to engage in unhealthy behaviors, such as drinking too much alcohol or overeating. Instead of turning to alcohol, smoking, or unhealthy eating, try to find ways to reduce your stress. Getting enough sleep, eating a healthy diet, and finding ways to relax can all help to reduce stress.
8. Avoid illegal drugs.
People who use illegal drugs, such as cocaine and methamphetamine, are more likely to have a TIA or stroke. These drugs can cause a stroke by damaging the walls of your arteries.

A pressure washer is a handy tool for cleaning cars, grills, lawn furniture, and more. And for the most part, they're easy to use. But with a wide range of options out there, choosing the right pressure washer can be a daunting task. Here's what you need to know to make the right choice.

 Decide what you'll use it for.
There are two main types of pressure washers: electric and gas. Electric pressure washers are quieter, cleaner, and easier to use, but gas pressure washers are more powerful and can tackle bigger jobs.

 Consider the pressure.
The pressure rating, measured in pounds per square inch (PSI), tells you how much force the water is under. The higher the PSI, the more powerful the pressure washer.

 Think about the flow rate.
The flow rate, measured in gallons per minute (GPM), tells you how much water the pressure washer can push out. The higher the GPM, the faster you can clean.

 Look at the nozzles.
The nozzles on a pressure washer control the angle and intensity of the spray. Most pressure washers come with several nozzles, each with a different PSI and GPM rating.

 Consider the pump.
The pump is the heart of the pressure washer. There are two main types of pumps: axial and triplex. Axial pumps are cheaper and more common, but triplex pumps are more durable and efficient.

 Look at the engine.
If you're buying a gas pressure washer, the engine is another important consideration. Choose an engine that's powerful enough to handle the job, but not so powerful that it's overwhelming.

 Check the features.
Pressure washers come with a variety of features, like adjustable nozzles, on-board soap tanks, and more. Consider what features are important to you and choose a pressure washer that has what you need.

 Read the reviews.
No matter what pressure washer you choose, it's important to read the reviews. This will help you get a better idea of how well the pressure washer works and whether or not it's a good value.

Tsetse flies can be a menace when outdoors. Besides causing painful bites, they can also spread disease. There are several different ways of dealing with tsetse flies, and you can even make your own trap.

Tsetse flies are found in many parts of Africa. They have a painful, stinging bite and can spread diseases like trypanosomiasis, or sleeping sickness. There are several different ways of dealing with tsetse flies, and you can even make your own trap.

The most common type of trap is a coil trap. To make one of these, you will need some thin, flexible wire, like aluminum wire. You will also need a tall plastic bottle. Once you have your materials, you will want to coil the wire around the bottle. Make sure that the coils are tight and that there are no spaces between them. Once you have coiled the wire around the bottle, you will need to cut off the excess wire.

The next step is to add a bait to the bottle. This can be anything from meat to fruit to vegetables. Once you have added the bait, you will want to cover the opening of the bottle with a piece of paper or cloth. Make sure that the opening is completely covered so that the tsetse flies cannot escape.

Now that your trap is ready, you will want to place it in an area where tsetse flies are known to frequent. Make sure to check the trap regularly and empty it when it becomes full.

How to Help Babies with Colic

Colic is a condition that causes babies to cry for long periods of time. Colic can be very frustrating for parents, but there are many different ways to help comfort your baby.

Understand colic.
Colic is a condition that causes babies to cry for long periods of time. Colic can be very frustrating for parents, but there are many different ways to help comfort your baby.

The exact cause of colic is unknown, but it is thought to be related to the baby's digestive system. Colic typically occurs in babies between the ages of two weeks and five months old.

Some experts believe that colic is caused by an immature digestive system, while others believe that it is caused by a sensitivity to certain foods or substances.

Regardless of the cause, colic can be extremely frustrating for parents. It is important to remember, however, that colic is not harmful to babies and will eventually go away on its own.

How to comfort a baby with colic.
There are many different ways to help comfort a baby with colic. Some common methods include:

- Ensuring that the baby's belly is full. This may involve feeding the baby more often or giving them an extra bottle of formula.

- Giving the baby a pacifier or allowing them to suck on a finger. This can help to soothe them by providing them with something to chew on.

- Swaddling the baby tightly in a blanket. This can help to soothe them by making them feel secure and safe.

- Using a baby massage technique. This involves gently rubbing or patting the baby's stomach and legs to help soothe them.

- Playing soft music or singing to the baby. This can help to soothe them by providing them with something calming to listen to.

- Doing some light stretching exercises with the baby. This can help to soothe them by providing them with gentle physical activity.

Being content is celebrating and reflecting on positive, happy memories.The memories and experiences which bring the most joy are often of a basic, everyday sort. For instance, you might find joy in eating a pie with your brother, playing baseball with your dad, or walking through the woods with your sons. Staying conscious of these simple things can help you become more content.;
, Cultivating mindfulness will help you stay in the moment instead of dreaming and scheming about how you can acquire more things and attracting more attention.


Pay close attention to the physical sensations you encounter and the condition of your body. Notice your posture, rate of breathing, and facial expression, especially when your emotions are running high. Scan your body from top to bottom. Start with your toes, then move to your legs, torso, arms, hands, and head. How does each limb or body part feel? Is it tensed? Loose? Aching or sore?
Become more aware of your senses. Feel the wind in your hair, the water from rain or the shower hitting your face, and the soft flutter of sheets on your skin. Try the raisin exercise, in which you utilize all your senses, one at a time, to describe a raisin in excessive detail.
Various forms of meditation are also useful for cultivating mindfulness. You could try walking meditation or loving-kindness meditation in order to identify better with all people of the world and refocus your thoughts and attitudes.
Remember that your emotions are not in control of you; you are in control of them. Your emotional reactions do not define you, only your actions do.

, Being selfish and narcissistic make us always want more. Many people get trapped in the cycle of “keeping up with the Joneses” and chasing after the newest styles, toys, cars, and technology. But doing so is directly at odds with the objective to be content with what you have. Generosity can help you overcome these selfish feelings.


Offer what you have to others, both in terms of time and material goods.Contact your local food bank, animal shelter, or soup kitchen and ask if they’re looking for volunteers. If they are, sign up for a few hours each week. You’ll not only provide a practical and important service to your community, but you’ll build your own sense of contentment as well.
If you do not have time to donate, purchase some canned goods and donate them to homeless shelters or food pantries. Dry goods like pasta are a good choice. Canned fruits and vegetables also make good donations. Perishable items like bread and fresh produce are typically discouraged.
Check your closet and basement for things which you no longer utilize or have use for. Toys, old books you’ll never read again, and clothes are some of the most common things which we accumulate over the course of our lives. If they do not excite you, pack them in a box or bag and donate them to second-hand stores.

, It is enough to recognize how lucky you are each day. It's easy to give thanks for all the small things in your life.


Express gratitude for your health. When you breathe in, for instance, stay conscious of your good health (if applicable). When you wake and open your eyes in the morning, recognize how lucky you are to have eyes to see (if applicable).
When you watch TV with your family or friends, you can recognize how lucky you are to have such great people to spend time with. You could also be thankful that you have time to watch and resources to own a TV.
If your dad is really helpful when you’re trying to work through some homework, say, “Thank you. I really appreciate all your assistance.”
Remember to be thankful for the basics. Food, shelter, family, friends, and a job are all that's truly needed.
Keep a gratitude diary. Write down all the things you are grateful for daily in your gratitude diary. It does not matter if there is repetition for some things you are thankful for on multiple days.
Read the news. Understanding how others live and what conflicts are going on in the world will help you better understand your own place in the world relative to others.

, When you’re feeling frustrated or bored with your material goods, think about each particular object’s history. Ask yourself, Who gave it to you? When? Why? Answer these questions in the form of a story in order to decide whether it is worth keeping. For instance, when you see your TV, you might think, “This TV was a birthday gift from my wife. She bought it because she knew I was tired of the old, poor-quality TV I had before. We have spent many happy hours watching films and shows on this TV.”


If the item has a special resonance for you, as the TV in the foregoing example does, you should retain it.
If nobody gave you the object in question, but you bought it yourself, ask yourself if it brings you joy. Do you still associate it with certain happy memories? Can you imagine life without it? If not, you should discard it.
Hold onto only those things which bring real joy. When you pick up, think about, or look at a certain personal object, if it does not make you feel like it belongs in your life, or if it doesn’t bring a smile to your face, you should discard it.Don’t let your objects and possessions rule or define you. Don’t hold onto things just because you might someday have a use for them.

, See the best in people and don’t be quick to assume people are possessed of ulterior motives.


For instance, if you meet someone who you like and who seems to really like you, instead of thinking “We’ll just break up in a few months anyway, dating would be pointless,” be optimistic by taking a chance and going out with her.
Being optimistic doesn’t mean being naïve. Bad things happen, yes. But it is important to expect good things and keep a positive mental attitude when faced with challenges.
When bad things do happen, ask yourself: is this situation really that bad? Is there anything good that might come of it? Is there a way for me to learn from this that I can apply to future experiences?

, Recognize that you don’t know everything. Be honest about your faults and weaknesses. Don’t obsess over your reputation, or take serious offense over what people who do not know you well think of you. While you shouldn’t allow people to walk all over you or verbally abuse you to your face, you should understand that people often say things which are stupid and untrue. Recognizing that the people who say hurtful things about you or those you care for have problems which you did not cause can bring an inner peace and contentment.


If you’ve hurt someone, or lashed out in anger, apologize. Say, “I am sorry for hurting you, can you please forgive me?”

, These things can bring happiness, but being truly content requires that your contentment is not linked exclusively or primarily to them.


If you lose the job or partner that you love, find something new to bring contentment. Remember that there are many jobs and many people who can make you happy.

, Instead of worrying about what you deserve, or what others should do for you, learn to be thankful for what you have. If your parents give your brother a big vacation for his birthday and they give you only a night out at the movies, don’t hold a grudge against either your brother or your parents. Instead, be thankful you had the night out. Don’t obsess over what you did or didn’t get. Doing so will reduce your overall contentment.


Explore why you feel entitled to more than you’re receiving.Do you feel snubbed? Do you think you’re better than the person who received more than you did?
Look for the upside to your jealousy. For instance, imagine you are jealous of a friend who was asked to donate to a good cause when you weren’t. You might be jealous of the person who was asked. But upon reflection you might realize you were jealous because you wanted to donate to a good cause as well. This means your heart’s in the right place.

, Find time for family and friends who care about and support you emotionally. Talk with them about your hopes, dreams, and desires.


For instance, if you get a raise at the office, you should share it with your family or close friends. Host a small get-together to mark the occasion at your home or at a restaurant.
Be generous with your praise and complements. If you see a friend wearing a handsome shirt, say “Wow, that shirt looks great on you.”
Being happy and content is a positive feedback loop. When you’re with people who are content, you’ll feel more content. Your contentment will make them feel more content as well.

, Familiarity might, over the long term, make it seem as though you know everything about them, but there is always more to discover. Ask what they think about current goings-on in their work life or their view of current events.


Watch the news with your partner regularly and discuss topics of importance.
When your partner returns from work or school, ask how their day went. Don’t just take “Fine” or “Okay” for an answer. Press them about who they talked or what they learned.
Dig deep into your partner’s life and you’ll stay content with them.

, For instance, when thinking of your partner, do not make the fact that he or she snores or has poor grammar their defining feature. Instead, take a slightly idealized view of your partner. In other words, focus mostly on their good qualities.


When your partner is complex and has a many-layered personality, you will be more interested over the long term. People in long-term, satisfying, and content relationships see their partner’s flaw and foibles, but perceive them overall in an idealized way. For instance, recognize that your partner might be constantly late, but concentrate first and foremost on their great sense of humor, sharp mind, and incisive analytical acumen.

,

Emotional addiction is the state of constantly chasing after someone who makes you feel good. If you are emotionally addicted to someone who does not love you back, or to the same degree that you love them, you will end up bitter, confused, and hurt. In order to avoid emotional addiction, build healthy relationships in which you and the other individual mutually value and care for each other.

To break the love addiction pattern, step back from your current or recent love relationships and evaluate them objectively. Make a list of all the negative behaviors you’ve engaged in with past romantic partners and compare them with behaviors in your current relationship. Negative emotional behaviors in a relationship context include dependency; short to nonexistent intervals of time between romantic partners or relationships; an inability to gain full closure on past relationships; and a belief in or pursuit of a perfect “soul mate.”
If your current relationship evinces signs that it, too, is a product of emotional addiction, break it off and take some time to assess how you can be happy outside of a relationship. Take at least six months of alone time during which you do not date, flirt, or engage in sexual liaisons with anyone.
Compare your relationships as an adult to the relationships you had with parents and other authority figures in your life as a child. For instance, perhaps you had a father who never paid attention to you unless you did something to irritate him. As an adult, maybe you go out of your way to irritate many of your partners because you feel they do not pay enough attention to you.
Accept yourself as you are, and learn to accept others who you decide to date in the future. Spend time with people who accept you in that way as well.
Judge people by their actions, not their words. If someone says that they don’t respect you, don’t rationalize their comments by interpreting it as a joke. Find someone who appreciates you for who you are.
Avoid engaging in a sexual relationship before an emotional relationship has developed., But doing something others love, remember, and are thankful for is equally important, and can yield an equal or greater amount of contentment. Find a way to make your current line of employment more beneficial more more people.


For instance, if you work as a janitor, you might feel your work is unrewarding or monotonous. However, you might explore your work as a janitor in order to find out how to reduce waste in your building. By reducing waste -- for instance through recycling or composting garbage -- you will be offering a valuable service to your whole community and, indeed, the whole world!

Cats can be mysterious and aloof, but they are also surprisingly affectionate and loyal, especially to those who earn their trust. Getting a cat to like you, or at least tolerate your presence, can be challenging if you don't know how to approach them. However, with the right approach, you can form a meaningful relationship with your favorite felines.

Make sure the cat wants to interact with you. Before you try to approach a cat, it's essential to determine whether it wants to interact with you or not. If the cat is avoiding eye contact, hissing, or running away when you come near, it probably doesn't want to be bothered. Give the cat some space and try again later.

Make eye contact with the cat. Look at the cat and establish eye contact. This will help the cat understand that you mean it no harm and are not a threat. Be gentle and patient while making eye contact, and the cat will be more likely to trust you.

Speak softly to the cat. Use a soft, gentle voice when speaking to the cat. This will help calm the cat and make it feel more comfortable around you. Use gentle, soothing words, and keep your voice low and quiet.

Don't make sudden movements. Sudden movements can startle cats and cause them to become wary or afraid of you. When approaching a cat, move slowly and deliberately, and avoid making loud or sudden noises.

Offer the back of your hand to the cat. Hold your hand out in front of the cat, palm facing the cat, and let the cat sniff and explore your hand. This will help the cat become more familiar with your scent and see that you mean it no harm.

Give the cat time to adjust.Cats are naturally cautious and may need time to adjust to your presence. Give the cat some space and time to feel comfortable with you. Avoid forcing interaction or handling the cat too much, as this can cause it to become stressed or fearful.

Offer treats to the cat. Once the cat is comfortable with you, you can try offering it treats or food to reward it for interacting with you. This will help the cat associate you with positive experiences and make it more likely to be friendly towards you.

Handle the cat gently. When you first start handling the cat, do so gently and with minimal physical contact. Gradually increase the amount of handling over time, as the cat becomes more comfortable with you.

Pay attention to the cat's body language. Cats use their body language to communicate, so it's essential to pay attention to the cat's body language to understand how it's feeling and whether it wants to interact with you. Look for signs of relaxation, such as purring or headbutting, to know that the cat is comfortable with you.

Be patient and consistent. Building trust with a cat can take time, so be patient and consistent in your efforts. Don't give up if the cat doesn't seem to be responding to your efforts at first. With patience and consistency, you can earn the trust and affection of your favorite felines.
