In general, medical malpractice occurs when a medical provider breaches or violates the standard of care, which then directly results in an injury to the patient. The standard of care is the reasonably accepted level of care that a healthcare provider should provide to a patient in a similar situation with the same or a similar medical condition. This standard of care may vary depending on the circumstances, as well as on the age of the patient and the nature of his or her medical condition. There are four specific elements to a medical malpractice claim:The medical provider must have owed a duty to the patient, which is inherent in the doctor-patient relationship.
There must be a breach of that duty by the medical provider.
The breach of that duty must be the proximate cause of the patient’s harm or damage.
Proximate cause means that “but for” the breach of duty, the patient’s damages would not have occurred.;
, Every state has a specific statute of limitations, or time limit, during which an individual can file a medical malpractice lawsuit. In New York, individuals have two and one-half years in which to initiate or file a claim for medical malpractice. The medical malpractice trial does not have to be complete by the statute of limitations. Rather, the individual simply has to file the lawsuit.


This statute of limitations begins to run when the injury occurs, or at the end of a continuous course of medical treatment during which the act causing the injury occurred.If you fail to file a medical malpractice claim within the statute of limitations, you are out of luck. You will have no right to file a lawsuit for medical malpractice after the statute of limitations has expired.

, Lawsuits seek to compensate you for your injuries. They can compensate you for compensatory damages such as lost wages, future lost wages, medical expenses, both past and future, as well as non-economic damages, such as your pain and the suffering, both past and future. Punitive damages also may be available in certain cases, where the evidence shows that the medical provider acted recklessly in causing your injury.Lawsuits do not directly seek to harm anyone's reputation. A doctor who is sued will not lose his or her medical license if the lawsuit is successful. A lawsuit attempts to compensate the injured victim, and at the same time, tries to ensure that the doctor does not repeat the same type of bad treatment that you experienced as his or her patient.

, These kinds of lawsuits often involve birth injuries, leaving objects inside patients’ bodies during surgery, failing to diagnose cancer or another medical condition, and a lack of oxygen during surgery, leading to brain damage. However, almost any type of medical procedure or negligence in medical care can result in a medical malpractice claim.

, Not every attorney has the same experience handling a particular type of legal case. You want an attorney who primarily handles medical malpractice and personal injury cases. You can evaluate an attorney’s experience by asking him or her the following questions:


How many years have you been in practice?
What percentage of medical malpractice or accident cases do you handle compared to other types of cases?
Do you try cases before the Supreme Court (the trial level court for New York)?
Have you ever lost a case? If the attorney claims that he or she has never lost a case, either the attorney is not being accurate or accepts clear-cut cases that he or she cannot lose. The majority of trial attorneys will have lost a case from time to time. Unfortunately, it's the nature of the beast.
Will you be the one who handles my case on a day-to-day basis? If not, who will be my attorney?
Whom do I call with questions?
How quickly will my attorney call back?
How often can I expect to receive correspondence from you about the status of my case?

, Most medical malpractice and personal injury cases are handled on contingency. This means that the attorney receives no fees from you unless you win your case. If you lose, the attorney loses as well, and receives no fees from you.Keep in mind that the expenses that the attorney pays to file and prosecute your medical malpractice case are your responsibility, whether or not you win your case. Technically, you are supposed to repay these expenses if you lose your case. Some attorneys do require this, but many don't. Be sure to ask your attorney his or her policy on this issue.
If you win your case, you can expect that your attorneys’ fees will be 30 % of the first $250,000 in damages that you were awarded, and a lower percentage of any damages beyond that amount. Some of your damages also will go to pay your healthcare expenses and medical bills.
For those folks who like to handle legal matters on their own, this is a very poor idea. Medical malpractice cases are a world unto themselves. There are many rules that must be followed and adhered to. If you fail to do so, you could seriously jeopardize your case, and because of some technical problem, never get your case to a jury to determine if you're entitled to be compensated for your injuries.

, Ask your treating physician for a short-term and long-term prognosis of your medical condition. Sign the documents necessary to allow your attorney to access all of your medical records and bills.A medical malpractice attorney always will request and review all of your medical records. Often, the attorney will want to review your medical documentation before agreeing to take on your medical malpractice case. If needed, your attorney will consult with an expert physician or other healthcare professional in order to determine if your injury or medical condition is sufficiently severe to merit a medical malpractice lawsuit. This is how an attorney will determine if you have a meritorious medical malpractice claim.
If you require additional treatment or surgery to correct a medical error, you may have a stronger medical malpractice lawsuit. Likewise, if you have become permanently disabled or will require extensive rehabilitation to restore you to your prior condition, you may have a meritorious medical malpractice claim.
There are no guarantees to winning. However, with good experienced counsel and thorough preparation, you stand a much better chance of being fully informed about your prospects and achieving a good result.
Due to the contingency fee agreement that most medical malpractice attorneys use, an attorney is unlikely to take on your case if he or she believes that it has no merit.

, You will be required to draft and sign certain legal documents to file your lawsuit in court. This is how any medical malpractice lawsuit begins. These documents include a complaint, a summons for each defendant, and certificate of merit.The complaint is the primary legal document in which you claim injuries as a result of medical malpractice and ask the doctor or healthcare professional to be held responsible for your injuries. In the complaint, you will detail the nature and amount of any special and punitive damages that you are requesting to be awarded as a result of your medical malpractice claim. Each defendant will receive a copy of your complaint after you file it with the court.
The summons is a legal document that formally notifies a defendant that he or she has been sued for medical malpractice. It contains the name and address of the defendant, the state and county in which the case is being filed, and the court in which the case is being filed.
Under New York law, you or your attorney also must file a certificate of merit, which advises the court that a medical professional has reviewed your medical records and determined that your claim has merit, or that you had insufficient time or were otherwise unable to have a medical professional review your records.

, This is likely to be the court in the county in which you live and/or in which your injuries occurred. You also will need to pay a court filing fee to the clerk’s office of $210.If your case is valued at less than $25,000, the case must be filed in New York Civil Court. If your case is valued at more than $25,000, the case must be filed in the New York Supreme Court. For cases outside of New York City, they would be filed in the corresponding county courts.

, Most plaintiffs hire a process server to serve the summonses, which can cost $100 or more, depending on how many defendants must be served and how difficult it is to serve them. The process server can be anyone over the age of 18. You have three different options to serve the summonses:Personal service – the process server gives the complaint and summons directly to the defendant
Substituted delivery – the process server gives the complaint and summons to someone other than the defendant at his or her home or place of business, also followed up by a mailed copy
Conspicuous delivery – the process server leaves the complaint and summons in a conspicuous place at the defendant’s home or business, also followed up by a mailed copy

, After the process server has served the defendants, he or she must sign an affidavit of service swearing to the court that he or she has served the complaint and summons to each defendant., After your complaint is filed and served on the defendants, they have 30 days to respond to the lawsuit in writing. Once the defendants file their responses, the lawsuit will proceed. If the defendants fail to respond, the court will assume that the allegations in the complaint are true and that the defendants are admitting to all of the charges.

, This is the phase of litigation in which your attorney and the attorneys for the defendants will exchange information about your medical malpractice claim. Your attorney will help you prepare for and respond to any discovery requests. This will include the following types of discovery:Requests for production of documents, such as medical records and medical bills
Depositions, during which you and the defendants answer questions under oath from the other party’s attorneys about your medical malpractice claim
Interrogatories, which are questions that you answer in writing
Independent medical exam, in which the defendants request that you undergo an exam by a doctor of the defendants’ choosing

, Throughout the duration of your medical malpractice lawsuit, your attorney and the defendants’ attorneys will periodically attempt to negotiate a settlement. They may exchange settlement proposals back and forth for a lengthy period of time. The vast majority of cases do end up in a settlement.Alternative dispute resolution may aid the parties in reaching a settlement. Mediation, in which the parties negotiate with the help of a neutral, third-party mediator, can give both sides a more realistic view of the pending medical malpractice claim.

, If settlement is not a possibility in your case, your claim must proceed to trial before a jury. The jury will hear evidence from you and all defendants before meeting to determine if and to what extent any defendant should be held liable for your damages.Recognize that a lawsuit takes time to come to a conclusion. The average time is 2-3 years from start to finish.

, Once the jury has made a decision, it will announce it to the judge and all parties. This verdict will determine if any of the defendants are liable and how much of a damages award you should get. The court will then enter judgment in favor of the plaintiff or defendant.

, If any party is unhappy with the judgment that the court has entered, he or she has the right to appeal the judgment to a higher court. These appeals typically would be filed in the Appellate Division of the New York Supreme Court, assuming that the case is worth more than $25,000. Any further appeals then would be filed in the New York Court of Appeals, the highest court in the state of New York.

This article tells you how to become a free software hacker. While there is no official title for this type of hacker, they are sometimes called "white hat" hackers. They are the opposite of "black hat" hackers, who are often malicious and seek to steal information or cause damage. Free software hackers are usually well-meaning and want to help improve the security of free software.

The term "free software" refers to software that is freely available to use, copy, and modify without any restrictions. Free software is often developed by individuals or small groups of people who are passionate about making it available to everyone.

The purpose of free software hacking is to find vulnerabilities or security holes in free software so they can be fixed before they are exploited by malicious actors. Free software hackers often work together with the developers of the software to identify and fix these vulnerabilities.

If you want to become a free software hacker, there are a few things you can do. First, you can learn about the basics of computer security and how to find vulnerabilities in software. There are many online resources and books that can help you with this. Once you have a basic understanding of security, you can start looking for vulnerabilities in free software.

When you find a vulnerability, you should report it to the developers of the software so they can fix it. You can do this by filing a bug report or by sending them an email. Once the vulnerability has been fixed, you can move on to finding other vulnerabilities.

It's important to remember that free software hacking is not always easy. It can be a lot of work to find vulnerabilities, and it often requires a lot of patience and persistence. However, it can be a rewarding experience to help make free software more secure.

How to Bake a Gender Reveal Cake

Baking a gender-reveal cake is a fun way to share the excitement of your pregnancy with friends and family. This simple vanilla cake recipe is easy to make and can be customized with your favorite fillings and toppings. When you slice into the cake, it will reveal a beautiful pink or blue center that announces the gender of your baby. 

Ingredients
One cake mix (18.25 ounces)
Eggs, milk, and oil (as needed for the cake mix)
Purple or blue food coloring
Pink or red food coloring

Prepare the Cake

1. Preheat the oven and grease a 9x13 inch cake pan.
2. Make the cake batter according to the package instructions.
3. Split the batter between two bowls.
4. Add 3 drops of purple or blue food coloring to one bowl, and 3 drops of pink or red food coloring to the other bowl.
5. Pour the batter into the cake pan.
6. Swirl a knife through the batter to create a marbled pattern.
7. Bake the cake according to the package instructions.

Fill and Decorate the Cake

1. Let the cake cool for 30 minutes.
2. Using a bread knife, carefully cut the cake in half horizontally.
3. Fill a pastry bag with your favorite frosting and pipe a thick line around the edge of the bottom cake layer.
4. Spread a layer of frosting on top of the cake, then place the second cake layer on top.
5. Use a spatula to smooth the frosting over the entire cake.
6. Pipe a border around the edge of the cake, and add any desired toppings or sprinkles.

An AMV is a video that combines audio with visual media. Fans of the Beyblade franchise often create AMVs featuring the characters and themes of the series. If you're interested in making a Beyblade AMV of your own, you'll need to gather footage, music, and editing software.

Gather footage.

The footage you use can be from the anime series, the manga, or any of the live-action movies or TV shows. You can also use fan-made footage, as long as you have permission from the creator.

Look for footage that matches the mood and style of the music you've chosen.

Some good sources for footage include YouTube, Vimeo, and other video-sharing websites.

Choose the music.

The music for your AMV can be anything from theBeyblade theme song to a song you like from another franchise. The key is to find a song that complements the footage you've gathered.

You can find music on YouTube, Spotify, or Apple Music, or you can use a music creation app like GarageBand or Audacity.

Select editing software.

There are many different editing software options available, both free and paid. Some popular choices include Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro, and iMovie.

Once you have all of your footage and music ready, you can start editing.

Edit the footage.

Edit the footage you've gathered to fit the music you've chosen. This will involve cutting and trimming clips to create a cohesive video.

Add effects and transitions.

Use effects and transitions to enhance the video and create a smooth flow.

For example, you can use dissolves or fade-ins/outs between scenes, or add filters to give the video a specific look.

Title and credits.

Create a title and credits sequence for your AMV. This can be a simple text-based sequence, or you can use footage and special effects to create a more elaborate sequence.

 Export and share.

Once you're happy with the final cut, export the video as an MP4 or other video file format. You can then share it on social media, like YouTube or TikTok, or with friends and family.

The PlayStation 2 is a great console with a lot of history. If you don't play it much anymore, or if it's broken, you might want to turn it into some cash by selling it. Before you can do that, you need to clean it up and tear it down so that you can put it into its box and ship it off. Let's get started!

Disassembling a PlayStation 2

First, make sure you have some plastic switches, a pair of tweezers, a metal spudger, a cleaning brush, and some compressed air. You'll also need a large Phillips-head screwdriver.

Step 1: 
Turn the PS2 console over and unscrew the three Phillips-head screws on the back. The bottom screw is longer than the other two. Be sure to keep them in a safe place so you can put them back later.

Step 2: 
Place the PS2 on its side and locate the two holes on the bottom. You'll need a paper clip or another small, pointed object to stick into the holes and push the clips inside the PS2 out. There are four of these clips in total.
One clip is located on the far left side of the PS2, one is on the far right, and two are in the middle.

Step 3: 
Use the spudger to carefully pry the back of the PS2 open. There are several clips along the top and bottom that need to be pushed down to allow the back to come off.
Just move the spudger along the top and bottom until you hear the clips release.

Step 4: 
With the back off, you can see the power supply. Unplug the power supply from the back of the console.

Step 5: 
The hard drive is located on the right side of the console. It will be in a silver cage. There are four screws that hold the hard drive in place. Unscrew them and the hard drive will come out.

You can see the fan on the left side of the console. Unplug the fan's cable from the motherboard.

The other cable is the power supply cable. Unplug that as well.

Step 6: 
With the fan and power supply cables disconnected, you can lift the motherboard out of the bottom of the console.

You can see the condition of the thermal paste on the CPU and the Northbridge. If the paste is dried out, it can cause overheating. If this is the case, you can reapply the thermal paste.

IT change management is the process of planning, implementing, and controlling changes in your organization's IT infrastructure. It helps ensure that your organization's IT environment remains stable and secure, and that any changes are well-planned and executed.

1. Identify the need for change

The first step in developing an IT change management program is to identify the need for change. This could come from a variety of sources, such as new business requirements, changes in technology, or the need to address security vulnerabilities.

2. Assess the impact of the change

Once you have identified the need for change, you will need to assess the impact of the change on your organization's IT infrastructure. This involves analyzing the potential risks and benefits of the change, as well as the impact it will have on various stakeholders.

3. Develop a plan

Once you have assessed the impact of the change, you will need to develop a plan for implementing the change. This plan should include a detailed schedule, budget, and resources required for the change.

4. Communicate the change

Once you have developed a plan for implementing the change, you will need to communicate the change to relevant stakeholders. This could include employees, customers, or suppliers. It is important to ensure that everyone is aware of the change and its impact on the organization.

5. Implement the change

After you have communicated the change to stakeholders, you will need to implement the change. This involves following the plan you have developed and ensuring that the change is carried out successfully.

6. Monitor and evaluate the change

Once the change has been implemented, you will need to monitor and evaluate its effectiveness. This involves collecting and analyzing data on how the change has impacted the organization, and making any necessary adjustments.

How to Cope with Trichotillomania
Trichotillomania (TTM) is a hair-pulling disorder that is difficult to overcome. But with support, you can treat it and prevent relapses.

Understand the symptoms of TTM.
Some people pull their hair when they're stressed or anxious. Others do it when they're bored, tired, or feeling any emotion. You may pull out your hair when you're watching TV, working on a project, or talking on the phone.

Pulling your hair may be soothing to you, but it's harmful to your body. Hair is a protein, so when you pull it out, you're actually pulling out a type of protein. Your body doesn't produce this protein, so you're depleting yourself of a necessary nutrient.

Remember, you are not alone. TTM is an isolated problem that affects just 1-2% of the population.

Seek professional help.
TTM is not something you can treat on your own. If you have any concerns about your mental or physical health, talk to a doctor or mental health professional. They can refer you to a specialist who can help you overcome this condition.

There are several types of therapy that can help with TTM. One type is cognitive behavioral therapy, which focuses on changing the way you think about pulling your hair. Another type is acceptance and commitment therapy, which helps you accept your feelings and make a commitment to not pull your hair.

Support groups are also helpful for people with TTM. They can connect you with other people who are dealing with the same problem. This can help you feel less alone and more supported.

Use relaxation techniques.
When you're feeling stressed or anxious, try some relaxation techniques to help you calm down. These techniques can also help you prevent pulling your hair.

Some relaxation techniques are deep breathing, meditation, and yoga. These activities can help you relax your body and mind.

Another relaxation technique is to try to change your focus. When you find yourself thinking about pulling your hair, try to focus on something else. This could be a hobby or activity you enjoy, or just something that's not related to pulling your hair.

Change your environment.
If you find that you're more likely to pull your hair when you're in a certain environment, try to change it. This could mean avoiding certain places or situations, or it could mean changing the way you interact with others.

For example, if you find that you're more likely to pull your hair when you're around a certain person, try to avoid spending time with them. If you can't avoid them, try to change the way you interact with them. This could mean talking to them about how they're affecting you, or it could mean avoiding them altogether.

 Similarly, if you find that you're more likely to pull your hair when you're in a certain place, try to avoid going there. If you can't avoid it, try to change the way you interact with the environment. This could mean changing the way you decorate or organize the space, or it could mean avoiding certain activities or situations there.

You can also try to change the way you think about your environment. This could mean changing the way you perceive the world around you, or it could mean changing the way you think about a particular situation.

For example, if you find that you're more likely to pull your hair when you're in a stressful situation, try to change the way you think about stress. This could mean realizing that stress is a part of life, and it's something you can manage, or it could mean changing the way you think about a particular stressor.

For example, if you find that you're more likely to pull your hair when you're thinking about a stressful event from the past, try to change the way you think about that event. This could mean realizing that it's in the past and there's nothing you can do about it, or it could mean changing the way you think about a particular memory.

Changes to your environment can also include changes to your physical environment. This could mean changing the way you decorate your home or office, or it could mean changing the way you use technology.

For example, if you find that you're more likely to pull your hair when you're on social media, try to change the way you use social media. This could mean taking a break from social media, or it could mean changing the way you use a particular app.

This is a guide to securely encrypting a USB flash drive on a public computer without needing admin rights to access it on that same public computer.

 encrypting a USB flash drive on a public computer without admin rights
There are a few ways you can encrypt a USB flash drive on a public computer without needing admin rights to access it on that same public computer. One way is to use a software encryption tool like VeraCrypt. VeraCrypt is a free, open-source encryption tool that allows you to create encrypted containers on your USB flash drive. You can then store your sensitive data in these encrypted containers, and access them on any public computer without needing to install VeraCrypt or any other encryption tool.

Another way to encrypt a USB flash drive on a public computer without admin rights is to use a hardware encryption tool like the DataLocker DL3. The DL3 is a portable USB flash drive that comes with built-in encryption. You can use the DL3 to store your sensitive data, and access it on any public computer without needing to install any software or drivers.

How to Scrimshaw

The art of scrimshaw is a long-standing tradition among mariners. It consists of etching or engraving pictures, designs, or other graphics onto objects. Historically, the objects were typically made of ivory, bone, or wood. Modern scrimshaw artists also etch metal, glass, and other materials. The process is similar to engraving.

Typically, scrimshaw etchings are done in a realistic style. Subjects are often maritime-related, such as ships or boat parts. Animals and flowers are also common. The design is usually done in a single color, such as black, on a light background.

A common scrimshaw technique is to etch a design into the surface of an object. The artist will first sketch or draw the design onto the object. Then, the artist will use a sharp object to carve or etch the design into the object. The artist may use a straight edge, such as a ruler, to ensure that the design is straight. Once the design is carved or etched into the object, the artist may use a variety of tools to add details or color to the design.

There are many ways to make a scrimshaw. One way is to etch the design directly into the object. Another way is to etch the design into a separate piece of material, such as a piece of paper or a metal plate, and then transfer the design onto the object. The design can be transferred by tracing the design onto the object or by pressing the separate piece of material onto the object.

There are many different types of scrimshaw. Some examples include:

-Etched scrimshaw: This type of scrimshaw is created by etching a design into an object. The design is typically created by drawing or sketching the design onto the object, then using a sharp object to carve or etch the design into the object.
-Painted scrimshaw: This type of scrimshaw is created by painting a design onto an object. The design is typically created by drawing or sketching the design onto the object, then using a variety of tools to add details or color to the design.
-Transfers scrimshaw: This type of scrimshaw is created by transferring a design onto an object. The design is typically created by drawing or sketching the design onto a separate piece of material, such as a piece of paper or a metal plate. The design is then transferred onto the object by tracing the design onto the object or by pressing the separate piece of material onto the object.

There are many different ways to finish a scrimshaw. One way is to leave the scrimshaw untreated, allowing the natural material of the object to show through. Another way is to add a finish, such as a clear coat or a stain, to the scrimshaw to protect it from wear and tear.

How to Draw an Eye in Colored Pencil

Colored pencils can be used to create a variety of effects, from a simple sketch to a detailed illustration. In this article, we will walk you through the steps to draw an eye in colored pencil.

1. Begin with a light color

To create a light base layer, start with a light color such as white, cream, or light gray. This will help to create a smooth surface for the other colors to blend into.

2. Add in the other colors

Now, add in the other colors that you will be using for the eye. This may include colors such as blue, green, and brown. Use light, smooth strokes to layer the colors over top of each other.

3. Blend the colors

Use a blender or your finger to gently blend the colors together. This will help to create a smooth, seamless look.

4. Draw in the details

Use a darker color to draw in the details of the eye, such as the pupil and the eyelashes. Use small, precise strokes to create the desired effect.

5. Add highlights

Use a white or light color to add highlights to the eye. This will help to create a more realistic and three-dimensional look.

6. Sign and date

Finally, sign and date your drawing in a small area in the corner. This will help to keep track of your progress and evolution as an artist.

How to Overcome Low Self Esteem

Fortunately, there are many things you can do to improve your self-esteem. Changing the way you think about yourself and your life can help you feel better about who you are. You can also improve your self-esteem by changing the way you dress and groom yourself, and by taking care of your body.

The One‐Penny Trick is a simple way to learn about compound interest and investing. This activity can be especially helpful for teaching kids about money. Follow the steps below to try the One‐Penny Trick for yourself.

Step 1: Get a Penny

Go find a penny. The year on the penny doesn't matter, but it should be in relatively good condition.

Step 2: Babe Your Penny

Now, you're going to "bury" your penny. For this activity, you will be acting as the penny. So, get a kid or adult to be the "banker." They will put the penny into a jar or box and "lock" it away for a number of years.

You can choose any time period you want, such as 1 year, 5 years, 10 years, or even longer. The longer you leave the penny in the box, the more it will grow.

Step 3: Add Interest

Every once in a while, the banker will add interest to the penny. They will continue to do this for the entire time the penny is in the box.

Step 4: Open the Box

After the designated time has passed, open the box. What do you see? If you had left the penny in the box for a long time, it would have grown into a fortune!

The One‐Penny Trick is a great way to learn about the power of compound interest. While the numbers used in this activity are not realistic, the principle behind it is. By " reinvesting" the interest you earn on your investments, you can make a lot of money over time.

A bad break up can leave you feeling sad, rejected, or betrayed. Here are some steps you can take to get over a bad break up and move on with your life.

Give yourself some space
Space can help you to get over a bad break up. Try not to see or speak to your ex-partner for a while so you can both calm down and decide what to do next. If you have to see them, try to keep it short and avoid talking about the break up.
If you work with your ex-partner, try to avoid spending time with them at work. You could try to work out a way of working that means you don't have to see each other.
Try to avoid going out with friends if you know your ex-partner will be there. You could also ask your friends not to talk about your ex-partner when you're around.

Accept how you're feeling
Give yourself time to grieve and process what's happened. You might feel sad, angry, or upset, and these feelings will probably be intense. You might find yourself thinking about your ex-partner a lot.
It's okay to feel these emotions, but try not to let them take over your life. Try to accept how you're feeling and remember that feelings like this will eventually pass.
You could try writing about your feelings in a journal, talking to a friend about them, or finding a therapist who can help you work through them.

 distract yourself
Distraction can help you to get over a bad break up. Try to find ways to keep yourself busy so you don't have time to think about your ex-partner.
You could try to take up a new hobby, go to the gym, or spend more time with your friends. You could also try to focus on work or school.
If you find yourself thinking about your ex-partner too much, try to distract yourself by doing something else. This could include going for a walk, reading a book, or doing some yoga.

Stay positive
Try to focus on the positive aspects of your life and remember that you are a good person. You might find it helpful to write a list of things you like about yourself or to do something that makes you feel good about yourself.
You could also try to find things that make you happy and focus on those. This could include spending time with friends, going to the beach, or reading a book.

Give it time
Getting over a bad break up can take time, so be patient with yourself. You might find it helpful to give yourself a set amount of time to get over your ex-partner, such as two weeks or a month.
You should also try to avoid making any big decisions or changes in your life until you're feeling better. This will give you time to think things through and make sure you're doing what's right for you.

Seek support
Try to find people who can support you through this difficult time. You could try talking to friends or family members about what's happened.
You could also try to find a therapist or counselor who can help you work through your feelings. It can also help to talk to someone who's been through a similar experience.

Try to learn from the experience
Try to learn from the experience and use it to improve your life. You could try to make a list of things you would do differently next time.
You could also try to understand why the relationship didn't work out and what you can do to avoid making the same mistakes in the future. This could help you to feel more confident about finding love again.

How to Unblock Copyright Infringement on YouTube

YouTube's copyright system is designed to protect copyrighted material from being illegally shared on the site. However, the system is also designed to be fair. If you have received a copyright strike, you can file a counter-notice to have the strike removed. You should file a counter-notice if you believe that the material you uploaded was not copyrighted, or that you have permission to use the copyrighted material.

If you have received a copyright strike, you should first try to contact the copyright holder directly. You may be able to resolve the issue without having to file a counter-notice. If you are unable to contact the copyright holder, or if you are unable to resolve the issue, you should then file a counter-notice.

To file a counter-notice, you will need to provide a written statement to YouTube explaining why you believe that the copyright strike was incorrect. You will also need to provide evidence to support your statement. For example, if you believe that the material you uploaded was not copyrighted, you might provide a copy of the material or a link to the material online. If you believe that you have permission to use the copyrighted material, you might provide a copy of the permission agreement or a link to the agreement online.

Once you have filed a counter-notice, YouTube will forward the notice to the copyright holder. The copyright holder will then have the opportunity to file a lawsuit against you if they believe that you have violated their copyright.

How to Find the Best Home Financing in Today's Market

Financing a home is a lot different today than it may have been for your parents or grandparents. Not only are there more choices in how you finance your home, but the financial landscape is always changing. To make the best decision for your needs, you must be well-informed. This article contains a wealth of information that can help you to make the best choices.

Beware of banks that ask you to make large deposits before applying for a mortgage. A lot of banks will accept as little as 3% down, but the problem is that you have to pay a high interest rate. When you put down 20%, you normally get a much lower interest rate, which can save you thousands of dollars over the course of the loan.

Having a good credit score is important. The better your credit score, the lower your interest rate will be. Make sure to use a lender that will take your specific financial situation into account. This will help you get the best rate that is possible.

Don't borrow the maximum amount you're offered. Your mortgage payment should never exceed one-third of your monthly income. Remember that you will also have to consider the area that you will live in. If you can't afford the payments, you can't afford the home.

Make sure you're not taking out a loan that's too big for your house. Consider your lifestyle and the way you spend money. Be sure you're being responsible and make sure you can afford it. Never take out a loan for more than what you can afford.

Look at the background of your mortgage broker before you sign with them. They should have experience and experience. There are many fly-by-night operations in the mortgage business, and you don't want to get caught up with one of them. Read reviews online to find out more about different brokers.

You should shop around when you are looking for a mortgage. Make sure that you do not rush into the first deal that you see. Make sure that you do a little comparison shopping. This will make sure that you end up with the best deal.

If you are a retired person in the process of getting a mortgage, get a 30 year fixed loan if possible. Since money is not getting interest in retirement, you can't afford higher payments that come with a 15 year mortgage. Yes, you will pay more in interest over the life of the loan, but you will have peace of mind every month for the next 30 years.

When you go to find a mortgage, make sure you bring a copy of your pay stubs with you. They will want to look at these to determine if you're able to afford the mortgage. Some lenders require you to have been at your job for a certain amount of time. Make sure you have these documents on hand.

When shopping for a mortgage, don't forget to ask about Sweat Equity. Ask the seller to contribute to help with closing costs or give you other financial incentives. This can help reduce the financial burden you might have to carry. Ask the seller to contribute to help with closing costs or give you other financial incentives. This can help reduce the financial burden you might have to carry.

If you have poor credit or no credit, you will need to find a co-signer to help you get your mortgage. Make sure you and the co-signer can afford the monthly payments. You can do this by having a payment set in stone before you take out the mortgage.

When shopping for a home mortgage, ask potential lenders about their foreclosure policies. Since the housing downturn began, many banks have adopted policies that make it difficult for home owners with financial trouble to refinance or modify their home loans. Get a loan from a bank that does not seem to be experiencing the effects of the downturn.

There are times when the seller of a property will finance a portion of the sale. This is called vendor financing. This may also be a mortgage or a land contract. If the payments are too high, it might be that you can find a different financing resource.

How to Live With Fibromyalgia or Other Chronic Pain

Description
While there's currently no cure for fibromyalgia, there are many treatment options that can help you manage your symptoms. In this article, learn how to live with fibromyalgia or other chronic pain, and find out how you can feel better.

Living with chronic pain can be difficult. There are, however, many things you can do to manage your pain and improve your quality of life.

Getting a diagnosis

Most doctors use a process of elimination to diagnose chronic pain. You may have blood tests, X-rays, or other scans to rule out other conditions.

Your doctor may also use tender point testing. For this test, they'll press on specific areas of your body, such as your neck or shoulder, to see if it causes pain. If it does, you may have fibromyalgia.

Managing symptoms

Fibromyalgia and other chronic pain conditions can have a wide variety of symptoms. These may include:

Pain and stiffness in the morning

Fatigue

Headaches

Increased sensitivity to pain

Hips, shoulders, knees, or other joints may be painful

Sometimes, it can be hard to know how to describe chronic pain.

How to describe chronic pain

"Pain is a word that everyone understands, but pain is a very different experience for each person," says Sarah, a chronic pain sufferer.

"For me, pain is a constant, background headache, and a knot in my stomach. I can't remember what it's like to feel normal. Sometimes, my pain is worse. Sometimes, it's a little better. I can usually manage to do most things, but sometimes I need to cancel plans or stay in bed. It's hard to know how I'll feel from day to day."

Aching, stiffness, or pain in the morning

"I wake up in the morning, and I hurt," says Angela, who has fibromyalgia. "It's like a deep, throbbing ache. I am usually very stiff, and I feel like I need to warm up as I start moving around. As I warm up, the pain decreases, but it's always there. It's just a part of me now."

 Managing morning pain

There are many ways to manage morning pain.

If you wake up in pain, try these things to help you feel better:

Stay in bed if you're hurting too much to get up.

Take a warm shower or bath to help relax your muscles.

Do some light stretching to help you feel more energized.

Apply a heating pad or ice pack to painful areas.

Try a pain-relieving cream or gel.

Take an over-the-counter pain medication, such as ibuprofen (Advil) or naproxen sodium (Aleve).

You may find that one treatment works better than another. Or you may find that you need to use a combination of treatments to feel better. It's often a process of trial and error to find what works for you.

Managing other symptoms

Fibromyalgia and other chronic pain conditions can have a wide variety of symptoms. These may include:

Pain and stiffness in the morning

Fatigue

Headaches

Increased sensitivity to pain

Hips, shoulders, knees, or other joints may be painful

Fibromyalgia can also cause:

Depression

Anxiety

Difficulty sleeping or unable to get enough sleep

Irritable bowel syndrome (IBS)

Chronic fatigue syndrome

Severe headaches

Muscle spasms

Tendonitis

 Bursitis

?"Fibromyalgia" means "tender points," which are specific spots on the body that hurt when you touch them. These are often located on the back of the neck, shoulders, and hips.

The pain associated with fibromyalgia is more widespread and lasts longer than the pain associated with arthritis.

Aching, stiffness, or pain in the morning

"I wake up in the morning, and I hurt," says Angela, who has fibromyalgia. "It's like a deep, throbbing ache. I am usually very stiff, and I feel like I need to warm up as I start moving around. As I warm up, the pain decreases, but it's always there. It's just a part of me now."

Things you can do to manage pain

Fibromyalgia and other chronic pain conditions can have a wide variety of symptoms. These may include:

Pain and stiffness in the morning

Fatigue

Headaches

Increased sensitivity to pain

Hips, shoulders, knees, or other joints may be painful

Try these things to help you manage chronic pain:

Stay active. You may be tempted to stay in bed when you're in pain. But physical activity can actually help you feel better. See a doctor or physical therapist to help you create an exercise plan.

Lose weight. Carrying extra pounds can increase the amount of pain you feel.

Don't smoke. Smoking can increase inflammation and slow down your healing process.

Consider massage, acupuncture, or meditation.

Look for a counselor or support group. Talking about your pain can help you feel better.

Don't be afraid to take pain medication. "Don't be afraid of taking medication," says Sarah, a chronic pain sufferer. "Some people are afraid of getting hooked on pain medication. I am not hooked on anything. I am taking what I need to take to be able to work, and I'm doing great."

Stay positive.

"Focus on what you can do, not what you can't do," says Angela. "I think staying positive is one of the most important things. It helps me keep going. There are good days and bad days. On the bad days, I keep a positive attitude, and on the good days, I'm happy. I remind myself that it could be worse."

How to Make Your Own Gasoline

Step 1: Understand the Dangers
Making your own gasoline is extremely dangerous. It can cause serious injuries and death, as well as severe legal consequences. Gasoline is highly flammable and can easily catch fire or explode. It can also be poisonous if ingested, so keep it away from children and pets.

Step 2: Understand the Complexity
Making gasoline is a complex process that requires a lot of chemistry knowledge and resources. You'll need to mix together various chemicals and compounds, and the process can be dangerous if not done correctly.

It's important to have a solid understanding of chemistry and gasification before attempting to make gasoline. If you're not confident in your abilities, it's best to leave it to the professionals.

Step 3: Gather the Ingredients
To make gasoline, you'll need a few ingredients that can be found at most hardware stores or online. These include:

1 gallon of water
1 cup of baking soda
1 cup of salt
1 cup of sugar
1 cup of flour
1 cup of yeast
2 tablespoons of vegetable oil
First, mix together the water, baking soda, salt, sugar, flour, and yeast in a large pot or container. Then, add the vegetable oil and stir until it's well combined.

Step 4: Mix the Ingredients
Once all the ingredients are in the pot, use a spoon or stir stick to mix them together until they form a thick, bubbly paste. The mixture will be very hot, so be careful not to touch it or get it on your skin.

Step 5: Allow the Mixture to Sit
After mixing the ingredients together, cover the pot with a lid or cloth and let it sit for 24 hours. During this time, the mixture will continue to bubble and ferment, which is what you want.

Step 6: Strain the Mixture
After 24 hours, strain the mixture through a fine-mesh strainer or cheesecloth into a clean container. This will remove any lumps or solids that may have formed during the fermentation process.

Step 7: Distill the Mixture
The next step is to distill the mixture. This will separate the gasoline from the other components, such as water and alcohol.

You'll need a distilling apparatus, which can be purchased online or made yourself. Follow the manufacturer's instructions for using the distilling apparatus.

Step 8: Store the Gasoline
Once the distilling process is complete, the gasoline will be stored in a separate container. It's important to store it in a safe, secure location away from children and pets.

Gasoline should be stored in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. It has a limited shelf life, so it's best to use it within a few months.

Step 9: Use the Gasoline
Gasoline can be used as a fuel source for engines, such as those found in cars, lawnmowers, and generators. It can also be used to fuel small engines, such as those found in lawn equipment.

It's important to use gasoline safely and responsibly. Don't smoke or have open flames nearby when using it, and always follow the manufacturer's instructions for using gasoline-powered equipment.

How to Make a Jello Mold

A Jello mold is a fun and easy dessert to make for a party or get-together. There are a few different ways of making a Jello mold, but here are the basics:

First, decide on what shape you want your mold to be. You can find Jello molds in many different shapes, such as a cake pan, a muffin tin, or a glass bowl. You can also use a regular cake pan and line it with plastic wrap, or use a cupcake mold.

Next, make the Jello according to the package instructions. Be sure to use cold water so that the Jello will set up properly.

Once the Jello is made, pour it into the mold. Be sure to fill the mold all the way to the top.

Then, put the mold in the refrigerator until the Jello is set, usually for about 4 hours.

When the Jello is set, carefully remove it from the mold. You can do this by gently lifting the edges of the mold and peeling it away from the Jello, or by turning the mold upside down and letting the Jello slide out.

Finally, slice the Jello and serve it.

Note also that there is an alternate version of "Taps" for bass clef instruments that uses the notes of the Bb major triad (F, Bb, D, and F again.)

, If you're not familiar with the song already, it's a smart idea to listen to a recording of "Taps" before you start playing. Though the song uses only four different notes and 24 notes in total, listening to the song being played can help you get a sense for the rhythms used in the song and, more importantly, the dynamics and emotional timbres used for it. The site linked above has a good-quality recording of "Taps" played by a solo trumpet.

, "Taps" is almost always written in common (4/4) time and the key of C. A slow, steady tempo (e.g., quarter note = 50 beats per minute) that's appropriate for the song's solemn tone is generally used.A metronome can be useful for practice, if you have one.


4/4 time essentially means that there will be four beats per measure and that each beat will be equal to one quarter note. Start mentally counting, "one, two, three, four" as you read the music, keeping your tempo as steady as possible.

,


The starting G is the first G above middle C on most versions of the sheet music, but it's possible to play "Taps" in any G-to-G octave that's comfortable for you.
Note the pickup notes — this means that the song actually starts on beat four, rather than beat one.

, First, play a dotted eighth note G, then a quick sixteenth note C, then hit the E above these notes and hold it for three beats into the second measure.

, On the fourth beat of the second measure, play a dotted eighth note G, a sixteenth note C, and a quarter note E (held only for a single beat. Play this G-C-E (quarter note) pattern again. Finally, play the same G-C-E pattern, only hold the E (which is now a dotted quarter note) for three beats instead of just one.

, This section is different than the patterns you played before. Play a dotted eighth note C, then a sixteenth note E above it, then hit a half note G above that and hold it for two beats. Play descending E and C quarter notes after the high G on beats three and four of the fifth measure. End by playing a dotted quarter note low G on the first beat of the sixth measure and holding it for three beats.


Note that the high G in this measure is exactly one octave above the low G you've been using for the rest of the song.

, Play a dotted eighth note (low) G, a sixteenth note G, and a dotted quarter note C, holding the last note for three beats.


Congratulations — you've just played "Taps."

, Playing the notes of taps exactly as they are written on the page is one thing, but playing them with feeling is another entirely. To do this, you'll need to pay attention to the symbols on the page besides the notes as well. For example, on the song's sheet music, almost every dotted quarter note is marked with a symbol that looks like a downward crescent over a dot (or a small eye.) This is called a fermata symbol and it means to hold the note somewhat longer than normal. Exactly how long you hold the note is up to you. Usually, to keep the song's solemn and dignified tone, it's best to play these notes for only a few extra beats, but feel free to play around with the fermata notes as you practice to find what sounds best.


The fermata notes in the song are most of the dotted quarter notes: the C at the start of the first measure, the E at the start of the second, the E at the start of the fourth, and the C at the end of the song. Note that the low G at the start of the sixth measure doesn't have a fermata — if it sounds good to you, you can usually still get away with extending this note.

, Notice the markings below the staff on the sheet music that look like long, skinny < and > symbols. These signal you to perform crescendos and diminuendos. This basically means that you should start the song at a medium volume (signified by the mf mezzoforte symbol at the start), then get louder very gradually until you reach the climactic high G, which should be fairly loud (signified by the ff fortissimo symbol underneath it.) After this, decrease in volume to a moderately loud level until the end of the song.


Don't go overboard with the loudest notes. You want to play strongly and powerfully, but if you play loud enough to hurt your listeners' ears, you'll diminish the seriousness of the song. In addition, on most instruments, extra-loud notes are hard to control tonally — you do not want to miss a note during the climax of the song.

, Notice the morendo under the final note on the sheet music. This is Italian for "dying" and it means exactly what it sounds like.When you play the final note, hold it longer than you normally would and let its volume gradually decrease as if it is "dying away." When you finish playing the note, it should be very quiet — as if you're almost playing nothing at all.


The contrast between the climactic high G and the final dying C note can be very powerful if done correctly. The effect this creates is one of powerful emotion giving way to gentle, almost tragic resignation. The special significance of this part of the song at funerals is obvious.

, "Taps" is often played as a chorale — that is, a slow, rhythmically simple song where the beauty of the tones is more important than the rhythms being played. This means that you can be a little creative when it comes to rhythm and tempo. As long as the relative lengths of the notes are preserved, don't be afraid to make individual notes longer or shorter than the music says if it gives the piece more emotional power.


For example, one change you might make is to slightly slow down the tempo during the climax of the song to give the notes a "bigger", more powerful effect. There are many more changes you may want to make like this. The exact changes you make are up to you!
In addition, it's worth remembering that since you'll almost always be playing taps solo, you don't need to worry about matching tempo with other players.

How to Install Forge Mod Loader (FML)
This article explains how to install the Forge Mod Loader (FML) for Minecraft versions 1.12, 1.10, 1.9, 1.8, 1.7.2, 1.6.4, 1.5.2, 1.4.7, 1.4.6, 1.4.5, 1.4.4, 1.4.3, 1.4.2, 1.4.1, 1.4, 1.3.2, 1.3.1, 1.3, 1.2.1, 1.2, 1.1, 1.0

 Forge Mod Loader (FML) is a software plugin that is used to make modifications (mods) to the popular video game Minecraft. This is done by creating a new file structure that allows the user to easily change or add to the game using their own personal touch. In this way, FML allows for greater flexibility and creativity when it comes to modifying the game.

FML is a Forge-only mod loader, meaning it only works with Forge-compatible mods. It does not work with Fabric mods, which have their own separate mod loader called Fabric Mod Loader (FML).

If you want to install mods that use FML, you will need to have Forge installed on your computer. FML will not work without Forge.

There are two ways to install FML:

The first method involves downloading the FML installer from the official website and following the on-screen instructions. This is the recommended method for beginners who are not familiar with manual installation.

The second method involves downloading the FML zip file from the official website and manually placing it into the correct directory on your computer. This method is more advanced and requires a basic understanding of file directories and Java files.

Once FML is installed, you will need to restart Minecraft for the changes to take effect.

If you want to install mods that use FML, you will need to open the "Mods" folder that is created by Forge when it is installed. This folder can be found in the same directory as the "Forge" folder.

Then, simply drag and drop your downloaded mods into this "Mods" folder and restart Minecraft for the changes to take effect.

How to Grow Ivy
Ivy is a climbing plant that can grow to a height of up to 39 feet (12 meters). There are several types of ivy, but the most common is the English ivy. Growing ivy is easy if you have a trellis or other structure for it to climb. Ivy benefits from regular pruning. If you don't want it to grow too big, you can cut it back to about 2 or 3 inches (5-7.5 centimeters) above the soil in late spring. This will encourage the growth of new leaves and help keep the ivy from becoming too unruly. 

When growing ivy, you should avoid giving it too much nitrogen. Too much nitrogen can result in more foliage instead of flowers. Instead, give it a good supply of phosphorus and potassium. These nutrients will help it grow strong roots and make it more disease-resistant. You should also avoid planting it near other plants that are sensitive to strong acids. For example, you should not plant it near azaleas or rhododendrons.

The best time to plant ivy is in the spring or fall. You should plant it in well-drained soil, and it should be kept moist until it is established. Once it is established, you can allow the soil to dry out between waterings. However, if the soil is too dry, the ivy won't grow well. It is best to keep the soil moist, but not soggy.

Ivy is a low-maintenance plant, but it can be susceptible to a few pests and diseases. Most common is the cotton cushion mealybug, which can be easily controlled by regular inspections and by removing infected parts of the plant. Mealybugs can also be removed with a cotton swab soaked in alcohol.

Ivy is an easy-to-grow plant that can add a touch of elegance to your home. It is best to grow it in a hanging basket or on a trellis, as it has a tendency to climb. With the right care, it will thrive and provide you with many years of enjoyment.

Make sure the evening can include mostly non-constructive tasks that can keep your off your busy daytime doings yet subtle enough in keeping your mind ready to drift off to dreamland. While blanket sleepers can help drift you back to sleep just before bedtime, they also have a secondary life during the evening hours shortly after most people get off the dinner table in which can get you ready to sleep with it on. Plan around the blanket sleeper's use wherever you are settling in that evening - whether that be at home, at a neighbor, friend, or relative's house or at another dwelling elsewhere.


Blanket sleepers can surely help you lounge around the house while watching TV or reading a book or doing something that won't involve much work or thought behind the action.;
, Many people struggle to find just "that right time" when they feel competent and ready to wear one and most struggle at first to get into one - and others to stay in them - during the evening and nighttime hours. It's often a chore that most blanket sleeper wearers dread - especially at first. Don't think about the garment as being a child-like blanket sleeper - think about them being just your ordinary night wear pajama that you love to wear each night - one that keeps you coming back to wearing them time and time again., Whether it's just a few hours off or it is only a few minutes off, evening hours means chilling and relaxing and getting ready to enter that state of sleep mode for most blanket sleeper wearers. Although most people begin to wear blanket sleepers only during the night, some tend to wear them non-stop throughout the evening and even into the next morning somewhat - and that's actually a good thing. Many wearers feel good enough to leave them on until they must remove them for other projects that are less comfortable and that they need to devote more attention to during the course of their normal day.

, Close all your drapes, turn on some ambient lighting and - if you'd like to - set the room's music level to some low-action "romantic-like" (almost towards a classical genre) music for which you can perform this one evening's tasks in. Keeping the mood peaceful and out of the thought of the wearer and on the action at hand will be your best thoughts towards achieving a great wearing time during the evening.

, If your sleeper contains pockets, stick in some of these items into the pockets so you don't have very far to reach when they are necessary to be used. Whether that low intensity item is a television remote control, landline and/or cellular phone or a small or other short book (such as a Harlequin romance book or similar short novel) or something else that will help you adjust to this piece of loungewear (and thereby get yourself ready for "sleep mode"), it's best that you get everything ready for the evening hours.

, Be sure to state to yourself the reason why you chose to do so. Even though you'd be escaping those hours when daytime use yields problems and escaping those hours that night-only use proves challenging to endure, evening use may prove to be difficult to ensure when others may end up coming over unexpectedly.

, You tried them on and found out that you could be courageous enough to wear one, and don't complain. Becoming courageous is something many people can't seem to muster, even though most people's minds are set to remove something that's seen as childlike, fairly-quickly. Embrace your inner child every night if you are not courageous enough to show it off to yourself and others.

, At this point, you don't need to have them in your hands accomplish this cleanse into trying them on for the night. This will provide for a more-confident feel on your body, knowing that you are now "at peace" with your mind, body and soul. Don't scream or do anything harsh that would make you want to remove the blanket sleeper onwards until the next morning when most people take off the sleeper., Change yourself into your blanket sleeper, as if you were your own children. Most adults will have to drape their legs over the edge of their bed because they are much larger than that of a child, to ensure they are wearing their sleeper for these evening hours.
